moves.desc: This move's type effectiveness against Water is changed to be super effective no matter what this move's type is.
moves.shortDescJa: Super-effective against Water.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  This move is super-effective against the Water type.

moves.name: Frenzy Plant
moves.shortDesc: User cannot move next turn.
moves.desc: If this move is successful, the user must recharge on the following turn and cannot select a move.
moves.shortDescJa: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.

moves.name: Frost Breath
moves.shortDesc: Always results in a critical hit.
moves.desc: This move is always a critical hit unless the target is under the effect of Lucky Chant or has the Battle Armor or Shell Armor Abilities.
moves.shortDescJa: Always scores a critical hit.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Always scores a critical hit.

moves.name: Future Sight
moves.shortDesc: Hits two turns after being used.
moves.desc: Deals damage two turns after this move is used. At the end of that turn, the damage is calculated at that time and dealt to the Pokemon at the position the target had when the move was used. If the user is no longer active at the time, damage is calculated based on the user's natural Special Attack stat, types, and level, with no boosts from its held item or Ability. Fails if this move or Doom Desire is already in effect for the target's position.
moves.shortDescJa: Hits the target two turns later.
moves.descJa: Inflicts typeless regular damage at the end of the third turn, starting with this one.  This move cannot score a critical hit.  If the target switches out, its replacement will be hit instead.  Damage is calculated at the time this move is used; stat changes and switching out during the delay won’t change the damage inflicted.  No move with this effect can be used against the same target again until after the end of the third turn.

moves.name: Gastro Acid
moves.shortDesc: Nullifies the target's Ability.
moves.desc: Causes the target's Ability to be rendered ineffective as long as it remains active. If the target uses Baton Pass, the replacement will remain under this effect. If the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero, this move fails, and receiving the effect through Baton Pass ends the effect immediately.
moves.shortDescJa: Nullifies target’s ability until it leaves battle.
moves.descJa: The target’s ability is disabled as long as it remains on the field.

moves.name: Giga Drain
moves.shortDesc: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.
moves.desc: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.
moves.shortDescJa: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.

moves.name: Giga Impact
moves.shortDesc: User cannot move next turn.
moves.desc: If this move is successful, the user must recharge on the following turn and cannot select a move.
moves.shortDescJa: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.

moves.name: Gigaton Hammer
moves.shortDesc: Cannot be selected the turn after it's used.
moves.desc: Cannot be selected the turn after it's used.
moves.shortDescJa: Cannot be selected the turn after it's used.
moves.descJa: Cannot be selected the turn after it's used.

moves.name: Glare
moves.shortDesc: Paralyzes the target.
moves.desc: Paralyzes the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Paralyzes the target.
moves.descJa: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: Grass Knot
moves.shortDesc: More power the heavier the target.
moves.desc: This move's power is 20 if the target weighs less than 10 kg, 40 if less than 25 kg, 60 if less than 50 kg, 80 if less than 100 kg, 100 if less than 200 kg, and 120 if greater than or equal to 200 kg.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts more damage to heavier targets, with a maximum of 120 power.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Power increases with the target’s weight in kilograms, to a maximum of 120.

moves.name: Grassy Glide
moves.shortDesc: User on Grassy Terrain: +1 priority.
moves.desc: If the current terrain is Grassy Terrain and the user is grounded, this move has its priority increased by 1.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Grassy Terrain
moves.shortDesc: 5 turns. Grounded: +Grass power, +1/16 max HP.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Grassy Terrain. During the effect, the power of Grass-type attacks used by grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 1.3, the power of Bulldoze, Earthquake, and Magnitude used against grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 0.5, and grounded Pokemon have 1/16 of their maximum HP, rounded down, restored at the end of each turn, including the last turn. Camouflage transforms the user into a Grass type, Nature Power becomes Energy Ball, and Secret Power has a 30% chance to cause sleep. Fails if the current terrain is Grassy Terrain.
moves.shortDescJa: For five turns, heals all Pokémon on the ground for 1/16 max HP each turn and strengthens their Grass moves to 1.5× their power.
moves.descJa: For five turns, heals all Pokémon on the ground for 1/16 their max HP each turn and strengthens their Grass moves to 1.5× their power.

moves.name: Grav Apple
moves.shortDesc: Target: 100% -1 Def. During Gravity: 1.5x power.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage. Power is multiplied by 1.5 during Gravity's effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: Gravity
moves.shortDesc: 5 turns: no Ground immunities, 1.67x accuracy.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the evasiveness of all active Pokemon is multiplied by 0.6. At the time of use, Bounce, Fly, Magnet Rise, Sky Drop, and Telekinesis end immediately for all active Pokemon. During the effect, Bounce, Fly, Flying Press, High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, Magnet Rise, Sky Drop, Splash, and Telekinesis are prevented from being used by all active Pokemon. Ground-type attacks, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Sticky Web, and the Arena Trap Ability can affect Flying types or Pokemon with the Levitate Ability. Fails if this move is already in effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Disables moves and immunities that involve flying or levitating for five turns.
moves.descJa: For five turns (including this one), all immunities to Ground moves are disabled.  For the duration of this effect, the evasion of every Pokémon on the field is lowered by two stages.  Cancels the effects of Bounce, Fly, and Sky Drop.

moves.name: Growth
moves.shortDesc: Raises user's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1; 2 in Sun.
moves.desc: Raises the user's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage. If the weather is Sunny Day or Desolate Land, this move raises the user's Attack and Special Attack by 2 stages. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella, this move will only raise the user's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage, even if the weather is Sunny Day or Desolate Land.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises the user’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage.
moves.descJa: Raises the user’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage each.  During Sunny Day, raises both stats by two stages.

moves.name: Guard Split
moves.shortDesc: Averages Defense and Sp. Def stats with target.
moves.desc: The user and the target have their Defense and Special Defense stats set to be equal to the average of the user and the target's Defense and Special Defense stats, respectively, rounded down. Stat stage changes are unaffected.
moves.shortDescJa: Averages Defense and Special Defense with the target.
moves.descJa: Averages the user’s unmodified Defense with the target’s unmodified Defense; the value becomes the unmodified Defense for both Pokémon. Unmodified Special Defense is averaged the same way.

moves.name: Guard Swap
moves.shortDesc: Swaps Defense and Sp. Def changes with target.
moves.desc: The user swaps its Defense and Special Defense stat stage changes with the target.
moves.shortDescJa: User swaps Defense and Special Defense changes with the target.
moves.descJa: User swaps its Defense and Special Defense modifiers with the target.

moves.name: Guillotine
moves.shortDesc: OHKOs the target. Fails if user is a lower level.
moves.desc: Deals damage to the target equal to the target's maximum HP. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness modifiers. This attack's accuracy is equal to (user's level - target's level + 30)%, and fails if the target is at a higher level. Pokemon with the Sturdy Ability are immune.
moves.shortDescJa: Causes a one-hit KO.
moves.descJa: Inflicts damage equal to the target’s max HP.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This move’s accuracy is 30% plus 1% for each level the user is higher than the target.  If the user is a lower level than the target, this move will fail.

moves.name: Gunk Shot
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to poison the target.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to poison the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to poison the target.

moves.name: Gyro Ball
moves.shortDesc: More power the slower the user than the target.
moves.desc: Power is equal to (25 * target's current Speed / user's current Speed) + 1, rounded down, but not more than 150. If the user's current Speed is 0, this move's power is 1.
moves.shortDescJa: Power raises when the user has lower Speed, up to a maximum of 150.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Power increases with the target’s current Speed compared to the user, given by `1 + 25 * target Speed / user Speed`, capped at 150.

moves.name: Hammer Arm
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the user's Speed by 1.
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Speed by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers user’s Speed by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: Hard Press
moves.shortDesc: More power the more HP the target has left.
moves.desc: Power is equal to 100 * (target's current HP / target's maximum HP), rounded half down, but not less than 1.
moves.shortDescJa: More power the more HP the target has left.
moves.descJa: Power is equal to 100 * (target's current HP / target's maximum HP), rounded half down, but not less than 1.

moves.name: Haze
moves.shortDesc: Eliminates all stat changes.
moves.desc: Resets the stat stages of all active Pokemon to 0.
moves.shortDescJa: Resets all Pokémon’s stats, accuracy, and evasion.
moves.descJa: Removes stat, accuracy, and evasion modifiers from every Pokémon on the field.

moves.name: Head Smash
moves.shortDesc: Has 1/2 recoil.
moves.desc: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.
moves.shortDescJa: User receives 1/2 the damage inflicted in recoil.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User takes 1/2 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: Headlong Rush
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def by 1.
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def by 1.
moves.descJa: Lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Heal Bell
moves.shortDesc: Cures the user's party of all status conditions.
moves.desc: Every Pokemon in the user's party is cured of its non-volatile status condition. Active Pokemon with the Soundproof Ability are not cured, unless they are the user.
moves.shortDescJa: Cures the entire party of major status effects.
moves.descJa: Removes major status effects and confusion from every Pokémon in the user’s party.

moves.name: Heal Pulse
moves.shortDesc: Heals the target by 50% of its max HP.
moves.desc: The target restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up. If the user has the Mega Launcher Ability, the target instead restores 3/4 of its maximum HP, rounded half down.
moves.shortDescJa: Heals the target for half its max HP.
moves.descJa: Heals the target for half its max HP.

moves.name: Healing Wish
moves.shortDesc: User faints. Next hurt Pokemon is fully healed.
moves.desc: The user faints, and if the Pokemon brought out to replace it does not have full HP or has a non-volatile status condition, its HP is fully restored along with having any non-volatile status condition cured. The replacement is sent out at the end of the turn, and the healing happens before hazards take effect. This effect continues until a Pokemon that meets either of these conditions switches in at the user's position or gets swapped into the position with Ally Switch. Fails if the user is the last unfainted Pokemon in its party.
moves.shortDescJa: User faints.  Its replacement has its HP fully restored and any major status effect removed.
moves.descJa: User faints.  Its replacement’s HP is fully restored, and any major status effect is removed.  If the replacement Pokémon is immediately fainted by a switch-in effect, the next replacement is healed by this move instead.

moves.name: Heat Crash
moves.shortDesc: More power the heavier the user than the target.
moves.desc: The power of this move depends on (user's weight / target's weight), rounded down. Power is equal to 120 if the result is 5 or more, 100 if 4, 80 if 3, 60 if 2, and 40 if 1 or less. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.
moves.shortDescJa: Power is higher when the user weighs more than the target, up to a maximum of 120.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  The greater the user’s weight compared to the target’s, the higher power this move has, to a maximum of 120.

moves.name: Heat Wave
moves.shortDesc: 10% chance to burn the foe(s).
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to burn the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to burn the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to burn the target.

moves.name: Heavy Slam
moves.shortDesc: More power the heavier the user than the target.
moves.desc: The power of this move depends on (user's weight / target's weight), rounded down. Power is equal to 120 if the result is 5 or more, 100 if 4, 80 if 3, 60 if 2, and 40 if 1 or less. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.
moves.shortDescJa: Power is higher when the user weighs more than the target, up to a maximum of 120.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  The greater the user’s weight compared to the target’s, the higher power this move has, to a maximum of 120.

moves.name: Helping Hand
moves.shortDesc: One adjacent ally's move power is 1.5x this turn.
moves.desc: The power of the target's attack this turn is multiplied by 1.5 (this effect is stackable). Fails if there is no ally adjacent to the user or if the ally already moved this turn, but does not fail if the ally is using a two-turn move.
moves.shortDescJa: Ally’s next move inflicts half more damage.
moves.descJa: Boosts the power of the target’s moves by 50% until the end of this turn.

moves.name: Hex
moves.shortDesc: Power doubles if the target has a status ailment.
moves.desc: Power doubles if the target has a non-volatile status condition.
moves.shortDescJa: Has double power if the target has a major status ailment.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target has a major status ailment, this move has double power.

moves.name: High Horsepower
moves.shortDesc: No additional effect.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: High Jump Kick
moves.shortDesc: User is hurt by 50% of its max HP if it misses.
moves.desc: If this attack is not successful, the user loses half of its maximum HP, rounded down, as crash damage. Pokemon with the Magic Guard Ability are unaffected by crash damage.
moves.shortDescJa: If the user misses, it takes half the damage it would have inflicted in recoil.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage. If this move misses, is blocked by Protect or Detect, or has no effect, the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP rounded down.

moves.name: Horn Drill
moves.shortDesc: OHKOs the target. Fails if user is a lower level.
moves.desc: Deals damage to the target equal to the target's maximum HP. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness modifiers. This attack's accuracy is equal to (user's level - target's level + 30)%, and fails if the target is at a higher level. Pokemon with the Sturdy Ability are immune.
moves.shortDescJa: Causes a one-hit KO.
moves.descJa: Inflicts damage equal to the target’s max HP.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This move’s accuracy is 30% plus 1% for each level the user is higher than the target.  If the user is a lower level than the target, this move will fail.

moves.name: Horn Leech
moves.shortDesc: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.
moves.desc: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.
moves.shortDescJa: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.

moves.name: Howl
moves.shortDesc: Raises the user's and ally's Attack by 1.
moves.desc: Raises the Attack of the user and all allies 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.
moves.descJa: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.

moves.name: Hurricane
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to confuse target. Can't miss in rain.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to confuse the target. This move can hit a target using Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop, or is under the effect of Sky Drop. If the weather is Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, this move does not check accuracy. If the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, this move's accuracy is 50%. If this move is used against a Pokemon holding Utility Umbrella, this move's accuracy remains at 70%.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to confuse the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: Hydro Cannon
moves.shortDesc: User cannot move next turn.
moves.desc: If this move is successful, the user must recharge on the following turn and cannot select a move.
moves.shortDescJa: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.

moves.name: Hydro Pump
moves.shortDesc: No additional effect.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Hyper Beam
moves.shortDesc: User cannot move next turn.
moves.desc: If this move is successful, the user must recharge on the following turn and cannot select a move.
moves.shortDescJa: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.

moves.name: Hyper Voice
moves.shortDesc: No additional effect. Hits adjacent foes.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Hypnosis
moves.shortDesc: Causes the target to fall asleep.
moves.desc: Causes the target to fall asleep.
moves.shortDescJa: Puts the target to sleep.
moves.descJa: Puts the target to sleep.

moves.name: Ice Beam
moves.shortDesc: 10% chance to freeze the target.
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to freeze the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: Ice Fang
moves.shortDesc: 10% chance to freeze. 10% chance to flinch.
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target and a 10% chance to make it flinch.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to freeze the target and a chance to make the target flinch.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to freeze the target and a separate chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Ice Hammer
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the user's Speed by 1.
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Speed by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers user’s Speed by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: Ice Punch
moves.shortDesc: 10% chance to freeze the target.
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to freeze the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: Ice Shard
moves.shortDesc: Usually goes first.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Ice Spinner
moves.shortDesc: Ends the effects of terrain.
moves.desc: Ends the effects of Electric Terrain, Grassy Terrain, Misty Terrain, and Psychic Terrain.
moves.shortDescJa: Ends the effects of terrain.
moves.descJa: Ends the effects of Electric Terrain, Grassy Terrain, Misty Terrain, and Psychic Terrain.

moves.name: Icicle Crash
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to make the target flinch.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Icicle Spear
moves.shortDesc: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.desc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.
moves.shortDescJa: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.

moves.name: Icy Wind
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the foe(s) Speed by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: Imprison
moves.shortDesc: No foe can use any move known by the user.
moves.desc: The user prevents all opposing Pokemon from using any moves that the user also knows as long as the user remains active.
moves.shortDescJa: Prevents the target from using any moves that the user also knows.
moves.descJa: Prevents any Pokémon on the opposing side of the field from using any move the user knows until the user leaves the field.  This effect is live; if the user obtains new moves while on the field, these moves become restricted.  If no opposing Pokémon knows any of the user’s moves when this move is used, this move will fail.

moves.name: Infernal Parade
moves.shortDesc: 30% burn. 2x power if target is already statused.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to burn the target. Power doubles if the target has a non-volatile status condition.
moves.shortDescJa: 30% burn. 2x power if target is already statused.
moves.descJa: Has a 30% chance to burn the target. Power doubles if the target has a non-volatile status condition.

moves.name: Inferno
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to burn the target.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to burn the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to burn the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to burn the target.

moves.name: Infestation
moves.shortDesc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.desc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.
moves.shortDescJa: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.

moves.name: Ingrain
moves.shortDesc: Traps/grounds user; heals 1/16 max HP per turn.
moves.desc: The user has 1/16 of its maximum HP restored at the end of each turn, but it is prevented from switching out and other Pokemon cannot force the user to switch out. The user can still switch out if it uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. If the user leaves the field using Baton Pass, the replacement will remain trapped and still receive the healing effect. During the effect, the user can be hit normally by Ground-type attacks and be affected by Spikes, Toxic Spikes, and Sticky Web, even if the user is a Flying type or has the Levitate Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: Prevents the user from leaving battle.  User regains 1/16 of its max HP every turn.
moves.descJa: Prevents the user from switching out.  User regains 1/16 of its max HP at the end of every turn.  If the user was immune to Ground attacks, it will now take normal damage from them.

moves.name: Instruct
moves.shortDesc: The target immediately uses its last used move.
moves.desc: The target immediately uses its last used move. Fails if the target has not made a move, if the move has 0 PP, if the target is preparing to use Beak Blast, Focus Punch, or Shell Trap, or if the move is Assist, Beak Blast, Belch, Bide, Blazing Torque, Celebrate, Chatter, Combat Torque, Copycat, Dynamax Cannon, Focus Punch, Hold Hands, Ice Ball, Instruct, King's Shield, Magical Torque, Me First, Metronome, Mimic, Mirror Move, Nature Power, Noxious Torque, Obstruct, Outrage, Petal Dance, Rollout, Shell Trap, Sketch, Sleep Talk, Struggle, Thrash, Transform, Uproar, Wicked Torque, any two-turn move, or any recharge move.
moves.shortDescJa: Forces the target to repeat its last used move.
moves.descJa: The target immediately uses its most recently-used move.  This is independent of the target’s normal action for the turn (i.e., it may end up moving twice), but otherwise functions as usual, including deduction of PP.  This effect works for disabled moves and ignores Torment.

moves.name: Iron Defense
moves.shortDesc: Raises the user's Defense by 2.
moves.desc: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.
moves.descJa: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.

moves.name: Iron Head
moves.shortDesc: 20% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.desc: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to make the target flinch.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Iron Tail
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: Jet Punch
moves.shortDesc: Usually goes first.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Usually goes first.
moves.descJa: No additional effect.

moves.name: King's Shield
moves.shortDesc: Protects from damaging attacks. Contact: -1 Atk.
moves.desc: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn, and Pokemon trying to make contact with the user have their Attack lowered by 1 stage. Non-damaging moves go through this protection. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: Blocks damaging attacks and lowers attacking Pokémon’s Attack by two stages on contact.  Switches Aegislash to Shield Forme.
moves.descJa: Blocks damaging attacks and lowers attacking Pokémon’s Attack by two stages on contact.  Switches Aegislash to Shield Forme.

moves.name: Knock Off
moves.shortDesc: 1.5x damage if foe holds an item. Removes item.
moves.desc: If the target is holding an item that can be removed from it, ignoring the Sticky Hold Ability, this move's power is multiplied by 1.5. If the user has not fainted, the target loses its held item. This move cannot cause Pokemon with the Sticky Hold Ability to lose their held item or cause a Kyogre, a Groudon, a Giratina, an Arceus, a Genesect, a Silvally, a Zacian, or a Zamazenta to lose their Blue Orb, Red Orb, Griseous Orb, Plate, Drive, Memory, Rusted Sword, or Rusted Shield respectively. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: Target drops its held item.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Target loses its held item.

moves.name: Kowtow Cleave
moves.shortDesc: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.desc: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.shortDescJa: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.descJa: This move does not check accuracy.

moves.name: Lash Out
moves.shortDesc: 2x power if the user had a stat lowered this turn.
moves.desc: Power doubles if the user had a stat stage lowered this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Last Resort
moves.shortDesc: Fails unless each known move has been used.
moves.desc: This move fails unless the user knows this move and at least one other move, and has used all the other moves it knows at least once each since it became active or Transformed.
moves.shortDescJa: Can only be used after all of the user’s other moves have been used.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  This move can only be used if each of the user’s other moves has been used at least once since the user entered the field.  If this is the user’s only move, this move will fail.

moves.name: Last Respects
moves.shortDesc: +50 power for each time a party member fainted.
moves.desc: Power is equal to 50+(X*50), where X is the total number of times any Pokemon has fainted on the user's side, and X cannot be greater than 100.
moves.shortDescJa: +50 power for each time a party member fainted.
moves.descJa: Power is equal to 50+(X*50), where X is the total number of times any Pokemon has fainted on the user's side, and X cannot be greater than 100.

moves.name: Lava Plume
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to burn adjacent Pokemon.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to burn the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to burn the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to burn the target.

moves.name: Leaf Blade
moves.shortDesc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.desc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.
moves.shortDescJa: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.

moves.name: Leaf Storm
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 2.
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Special Attack by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages after inflicting damage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages.

moves.name: Leech Life
moves.shortDesc: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.
moves.desc: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.
moves.shortDescJa: Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.

moves.name: Leech Seed
moves.shortDesc: 1/8 of target's HP is restored to user every turn.
moves.desc: The Pokemon at the user's position steals 1/8 of the target's maximum HP, rounded down, at the end of each turn. If Big Root is held by the recipient, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down. If the target uses Baton Pass, the replacement will continue being leeched. If the target switches out or uses Mortal Spin or Rapid Spin successfully, the effect ends. Grass-type Pokemon are immune to this move on use, but not its effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Seeds the target, stealing HP from it every turn.
moves.descJa: Plants a seed on the target that drains 1/8 of its max HP at the end of every turn and heals the user for the amount taken.  Has no effect on Grass Pokémon.  The seed remains until the target leaves the field.

moves.name: Life Dew
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user and its allies by 1/4 their max HP.
moves.desc: Each Pokemon on the user's side restores 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.
moves.shortDescJa: Heals the user and its allies by 1/4 their max HP.
moves.descJa: Each Pokemon on the user's side restores 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.

moves.name: Light of Ruin
moves.shortDesc: Has 1/2 recoil.
moves.desc: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.
moves.shortDescJa: User receives 1/2 the damage inflicted in recoil.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User takes 1/2 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: Light Screen
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, special damage to allies is halved.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the user and its party members take 0.5x damage from special attacks, or 0.66x damage if in a Double Battle. Damage is not reduced further with Aurora Veil. Critical hits ignore this effect. It is removed from the user's side if the user or an ally is successfully hit by Brick Break, Psychic Fangs, or Defog. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Light Clay. Fails if the effect is already active on the user's side.
moves.shortDescJa: Reduces damage from special attacks by 50% for five turns.
moves.descJa: Erects a barrier around the user’s side of the field that reduces damage from special attacks by half for five turns.  In double battles, the reduction is 1/3.  Critical hits are not affected by the barrier.

moves.name: Liquidation
moves.shortDesc: 20% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 20% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: Lock-On
moves.shortDesc: User's next move will not miss the target.
moves.desc: Until the end of the next turn, the target cannot avoid the user's moves, even if the target is in the middle of a two-turn move. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field. Fails if this effect is active for the user.
moves.shortDescJa: Ensures that the user’s next move will hit the target.
moves.descJa: If the user targets the same target again before the end of the next turn, the move it uses is guaranteed to hit.  This move itself also ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.

moves.name: Low Kick
moves.shortDesc: More power the heavier the target.
moves.desc: This move's power is 20 if the target weighs less than 10 kg, 40 if less than 25 kg, 60 if less than 50 kg, 80 if less than 100 kg, 100 if less than 200 kg, and 120 if greater than or equal to 200 kg.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts more damage to heavier targets, with a maximum of 120 power.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Power increases with the target’s weight in kilograms, to a maximum of 120.

moves.name: Low Sweep
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.
moves.descJa: Lowers the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: Lumina Crash
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 2.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 2.
moves.descJa: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 2 stages.

moves.name: Lunge
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.

moves.name: Mach Punch
moves.shortDesc: Usually goes first.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Magic Powder
moves.shortDesc: Changes the target's type to Psychic.
moves.desc: Causes the target to become a Psychic type. Fails if the target is an Arceus or a Silvally, if the target is already purely Psychic type, or if the target is Terastallized.
moves.shortDescJa: Changes the target's type to Psychic.
moves.descJa: Causes the target to become a Psychic type. Fails if the target is an Arceus or a Silvally, if the target is already purely Psychic type, or if the target is Terastallized.

moves.name: Magic Room
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, all held items have no effect.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the held items of all active Pokemon have no effect. An item's effect of causing forme changes is unaffected, but any other effects from such items are negated. During the effect, Fling and Natural Gift are prevented from being used by all active Pokemon. If this move is used during the effect, the effect ends.
moves.shortDescJa: Negates held items for five turns.
moves.descJa: For five turns (including this one), passive effects of held items are ignored, and Pokémon will not use their held items.

moves.name: Magnet Rise
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, the user has immunity to Ground.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the user is immune to Ground-type attacks and the effects of Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Sticky Web, and the Arena Trap Ability as long as it remains active. If the user uses Baton Pass, the replacement will gain the effect. Ingrain, Smack Down, Thousand Arrows, and Iron Ball override this move if the user is under any of their effects. Fails if the user is already under this effect or the effects of Ingrain, Smack Down, or Thousand Arrows.
moves.shortDescJa: User is immune to Ground moves and effects for five turns.
moves.descJa: For five turns, the user is immune to Ground moves.

moves.name: Magnetic Flux
moves.shortDesc: Raises Def, Sp. Def of allies with Plus/Minus by 1.
moves.desc: Raises the Defense and Special Defense of Pokemon on the user's side with the Plus or Minus Abilities by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises the Defense and Special Defense of all friendly Pokémon with Plus or Minus by one stage.
moves.descJa: Raises the Defense and Special Defense of all friendly Pokémon with Plus or Minus by one stage.

moves.name: Matcha Gotcha
moves.shortDesc: 20% burn. Recovers 50% dmg dealt. Thaws foe(s).
moves.desc: Has a 20% chance to burn the target. The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down. The target thaws out if it is frozen.
moves.shortDescJa: 20% burn. Recovers 50% dmg dealt. Thaws foe(s).
moves.descJa: Has a 20% chance to burn the target. The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down. The target thaws out if it is frozen.

moves.name: Mean Look
moves.shortDesc: Prevents the target from switching out.
moves.desc: Prevents the target from switching out. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field.
moves.shortDescJa: Prevents the target from leaving battle.
moves.descJa: The target cannot switch out normally.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This effect ends when the user leaves the field.

moves.name: Mega Kick
moves.shortDesc: No additional effect.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Megahorn
moves.shortDesc: No additional effect.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Memento
moves.shortDesc: Lowers target's Attack, Sp. Atk by 2. User faints.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 2 stages. The user faints unless this move misses or there is no target. Fails entirely if this move hits a substitute, but does not fail if the target's stats cannot be changed.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by two stages.  User faints.
moves.descJa: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by two stages.  User faints.

moves.name: Metal Burst
moves.shortDesc: If hit by an attack, returns 1.5x damage.
moves.desc: Deals damage to the last opposing Pokemon to hit the user with a physical or special attack this turn equal to 1.5 times the HP lost by the user from that attack, rounded down. If the user did not lose HP from that attack, this move deals 1 HP of damage instead. If that opposing Pokemon's position is no longer in use and there is another opposing Pokemon on the field, the damage is done to it instead. Only the last hit of a multi-hit attack is counted. Fails if the user was not hit by an opposing Pokemon's physical or special attack this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: Strikes back at the last Pokémon to hit the user this turn with 1.5× the damage.
moves.descJa: Targets the last opposing Pokémon to hit the user with a damaging move this turn.  Inflicts 1.5× the damage that move did to the user.  If there is no eligible target, this move will fail.  Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored.

moves.name: Metal Sound
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the target's Sp. Def by 2.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Special Defense by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.
moves.descJa: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.

moves.name: Meteor Beam
moves.shortDesc: Raises user's Sp. Atk by 1 on turn 1. Hits turn 2.
moves.desc: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. Raises the user's Special Attack by 1 stage on the first turn. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Meteor Mash
moves.shortDesc: 20% chance to raise the user's Attack by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 20% chance to raise the user's Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to raise the user’s Attack by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to raise the user’s Attack one stage.

moves.name: Milk Drink
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user by 50% of its max HP.
moves.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.
moves.shortDescJa: Heals the user by half its max HP.
moves.descJa: Heals the user for half its max HP.

moves.name: Minimize
moves.shortDesc: Raises the user's evasiveness by 2.
moves.desc: Raises the user's evasiveness by 2 stages. Whether or not the user's evasiveness was changed, Body Slam, Dragon Rush, Flying Press, Heat Crash, Heavy Slam, Malicious Moonsault, Steamroller, Stomp, and Supercell Slam will not check accuracy and have their damage doubled if used against the user while it is active.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises the user’s evasion by two stages.
moves.descJa: Raises the user’s evasion by two stages.

moves.name: Mirror Coat
moves.shortDesc: If hit by special attack, returns double damage.
moves.desc: Deals damage to the last opposing Pokemon to hit the user with a special attack this turn equal to twice the HP lost by the user from that attack. If the user did not lose HP from the attack, this move deals 1 HP of damage instead. If that opposing Pokemon's position is no longer in use and there is another opposing Pokemon on the field, the damage is done to it instead. Only the last hit of a multi-hit attack is counted. Fails if the user was not hit by an opposing Pokemon's special attack this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts twice the damage the user received from the last special hit it took.
moves.descJa: Targets the last opposing Pokémon to hit the user with a special move this turn.  Inflicts twice the damage that move did to the user.  If there is no eligible target, this move will fail.  Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored.

moves.name: Misty Explosion
moves.shortDesc: User faints. User on Misty Terrain: 1.5x power.
moves.desc: If the current terrain is Misty Terrain and the user is grounded, this move's power is multiplied by 1.5. The user faints after using this move, even if this move fails for having no target. This move is prevented from executing if any active Pokemon has the Damp Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Misty Terrain
moves.shortDesc: 5 turns. Can't status,-Dragon power vs grounded.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Misty Terrain. During the effect, the power of Dragon-type attacks used against grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 0.5 and grounded Pokemon cannot be inflicted with a non-volatile status condition nor confusion. Grounded Pokemon can become affected by Yawn but cannot fall asleep from its effect. Camouflage transforms the user into a Fairy type, Nature Power becomes Moonblast, and Secret Power has a 30% chance to lower Special Attack by 1 stage. Fails if the current terrain is Misty Terrain.
moves.shortDescJa: For five turns, protects all Pokémon on the ground from major status ailments and confusion, and halves the power of incoming Dragon moves.
moves.descJa: For five turns, protects all Pokémon on the ground from major status ailments and confusion and weakens Dragon moves used against them to 0.5× their power.

moves.name: Moonblast
moves.shortDesc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: Moonlight
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user by a weather-dependent amount.
moves.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP if Delta Stream or no weather conditions are in effect or if the user is holding Utility Umbrella, 2/3 of its maximum HP if the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, and 1/4 of its maximum HP if the weather is Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Sandstorm, or Snow, all rounded half down.
moves.shortDescJa: Heals the user by half its max HP.  Affected by weather.
moves.descJa: Heals the user for half its max HP.

moves.name: Morning Sun
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user by a weather-dependent amount.
moves.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP if Delta Stream or no weather conditions are in effect or if the user is holding Utility Umbrella, 2/3 of its maximum HP if the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, and 1/4 of its maximum HP if the weather is Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Sandstorm, or Snow, all rounded half down.
moves.shortDescJa: Heals the user by half its max HP.  Affected by weather.
moves.descJa: Heals the user for half its max HP.

moves.name: Mortal Spin
moves.shortDesc: Poisons foes, frees user from hazards/bind/leech.
moves.desc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the effects of Leech Seed and binding moves end for the user, and all hazards are removed from the user's side of the field. Has a 100% chance to poison the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Poisons foes, frees user from hazards/bind/leech.
moves.descJa: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the effects of Leech Seed and binding moves end for the user, and all hazards are removed from the user's side of the field. Has a 100% chance to poison the target.

moves.name: Mountain Gale
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.shortDescJa: 30% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.descJa: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Mud Shot
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: Mud-Slap
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: Muddy Water
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to lower the foe(s) accuracy by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: Mystical Fire
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: Nasty Plot
moves.shortDesc: Raises the user's Sp. Atk by 2.
moves.desc: Raises the user's Special Attack by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises the user’s Special Attack by two stages.
moves.descJa: Raises the user’s Special Attack by two stages.

moves.name: Night Daze
moves.shortDesc: 40% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 40% chance to lower the target's accuracy by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: Night Shade
moves.shortDesc: Does damage equal to the user's level.
moves.desc: Deals damage to the target equal to the user's level.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level.
moves.descJa: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level.  Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored.

moves.name: Night Slash
moves.shortDesc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.desc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.
moves.shortDescJa: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.

moves.name: Noble Roar
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage.
moves.descJa: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: Nuzzle
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to paralyze the target.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to paralyze the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to paralyze the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: Outrage
moves.shortDesc: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
moves.desc: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.
moves.shortDescJa: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to attack with this move for 2–3 turns,selected at random.  After the last hit, the user becomes confused.

moves.name: Overheat
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 2.
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Special Attack by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages after inflicting damage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages.

moves.name: Pain Split
moves.shortDesc: Shares HP of user and target equally.
moves.desc: The user and the target's HP become the average of their current HP, rounded down, but not more than the maximum HP of either one.
moves.shortDescJa: Sets the user’s and targets’s HP to the average of their current HP.
moves.descJa: Changes the user’s and target’s remaining HP to the average of their current remaining HP.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This effect does not count as inflicting damage for other moves and effects that respond to damage taken.

moves.name: Parabolic Charge
moves.shortDesc: User recovers 50% of the damage dealt.
moves.desc: The user recovers 1/2 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down.
moves.shortDescJa: Heals the user for half the total damage dealt to all targets.
moves.descJa: Heals the user for half the total damage dealt to all targets.

moves.name: Parting Shot
moves.shortDesc: Lowers target's Atk, Sp. Atk by 1. User switches.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage. If this move is successful, the user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if the target's Attack and Special Attack stat stages were both unchanged, or if there are no unfainted party members.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers all targets’ Attack and Special Attack by one stage.  Makes the user switch out.
moves.descJa: Lowers all targets’ Attack and Special Attack by one stage.  Makes the user switch out.

moves.name: Payback
moves.shortDesc: Power doubles if the user moves after the target.
moves.desc: Power doubles if the user moves after the target this turn, including actions taken through Instruct or the Dancer Ability. Switching in does not count as an action.
moves.shortDescJa: Power is doubled if the target has already moved this turn.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target uses a move or switches out this turn before this move is used, this move has double power.

moves.name: Perish Song
moves.shortDesc: All active Pokemon will faint in 3 turns.
moves.desc: Each active Pokemon receives a perish count of 4 if it doesn't already have a perish count. At the end of each turn including the turn used, the perish count of all active Pokemon lowers by 1 and Pokemon faint if the number reaches 0. The perish count is removed from Pokemon that switch out. If a Pokemon uses Baton Pass while it has a perish count, the replacement will gain the perish count and continue to count down.
moves.shortDescJa: User and target both faint after three turns.
moves.descJa: Every Pokémon is given a counter that starts at 3 and decreases by 1 at the end of every turn, including this one.  When a Pokémon’s counter reaches zero, that Pokémon faints.  A Pokémon that leaves the field will lose its counter; its replacement does not inherit the effect, and other Pokémon’s counters remain.

moves.name: Petal Blizzard
moves.shortDesc: No additional effect. Hits adjacent Pokemon.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Petal Dance
moves.shortDesc: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
moves.desc: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.
moves.shortDescJa: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to attack with this move for 2–3 turns,selected at random.  After the last hit, the user becomes confused.

moves.name: Phantom Force
moves.shortDesc: Disappears turn 1. Hits turn 2. Breaks protection.
moves.desc: If this move is successful, it breaks through the target's Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, or Spiky Shield for this turn, allowing other Pokemon to attack the target normally. If the target's side is protected by Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard, that protection is also broken for this turn and other Pokemon may attack the target's side normally. This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. On the first turn, the user avoids all attacks. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.
moves.shortDescJa: User vanishes, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.  Hits through Protect and Detect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User vanishes for one turn, becoming immune to attack, and hits on the second turn.

moves.name: Pin Missile
moves.shortDesc: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.desc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.
moves.shortDescJa: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.

moves.name: Play Rough
moves.shortDesc: 10% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.

moves.name: Pluck
moves.shortDesc: User steals and eats the target's Berry.
moves.desc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, it steals the target's held Berry if it is holding one and eats it immediately, gaining its effects even if the user's item is being ignored. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: If target has a berry, inflicts double damage and uses the berry.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target is holding a berry, this move has double power, and the user takes the berry and uses it immediately.

moves.name: Poison Fang
moves.shortDesc: 50% chance to badly poison the target.
moves.desc: Has a 50% chance to badly poison the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to badly poison the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to badly poison the target.

moves.name: Poison Jab
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to poison the target.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to poison the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to poison the target.

moves.name: Poison Powder
moves.shortDesc: Poisons the target.
moves.desc: Poisons the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Poisons the target.
moves.descJa: Poisons the target.

moves.name: Pollen Puff
moves.shortDesc: If the target is an ally, heals 50% of its max HP.
moves.desc: If the target is an ally, this move restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded down, instead of dealing damage.
moves.shortDescJa: Damages opponents, but heals allies for 50% of their max HP.
moves.descJa: If the target is an opponent, inflicts regular damage.  If the target is an ally, heals the target for 50% of its max HP.

moves.name: Poltergeist
moves.shortDesc: Fails if the target has no held item.
moves.desc: Fails if the target has no held item.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Population Bomb
moves.shortDesc: Hits 10 times. Each hit can miss.
moves.desc: Hits ten times. This move checks accuracy for each hit, and the attack ends if the target avoids a hit. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit ten times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move hits four to ten times at random without checking accuracy between hits.
moves.shortDescJa: Hits 10 times. Each hit can miss.
moves.descJa: Hits ten times. This move checks accuracy for each hit, and the attack ends if the target avoids a hit. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit ten times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move hits four to ten times at random without checking accuracy between hits.

moves.name: Pounce
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
moves.descJa: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Pound
moves.shortDesc: No additional effect.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Power Gem
moves.shortDesc: No additional effect.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Power Shift
moves.shortDesc: Switches user's Attack and Defense stats.
moves.desc: The user swaps its Attack and Defense stats, and stat stage changes remain on their respective stats. This move can be used again to swap the stats back. If the user uses Baton Pass, the replacement will have its Attack and Defense stats swapped if the effect is active. If the user has its stats recalculated by changing forme while its stats are swapped, this effect is ignored but is still active for the purposes of Baton Pass.
moves.shortDescJa: Switches user's Attack and Defense stats.
moves.descJa: The user swaps its Attack and Defense stats, and stat stage changes remain on their respective stats. This move can be used again to swap the stats back. If the user uses Baton Pass, the replacement will have its Attack and Defense stats swapped if the effect is active. If the user has its stats recalculated by changing forme while its stats are swapped, this effect is ignored but is still active for the purposes of Baton Pass.

moves.name: Power Split
moves.shortDesc: Averages Attack and Sp. Atk stats with target.
moves.desc: The user and the target have their Attack and Special Attack stats set to be equal to the average of the user and the target's Attack and Special Attack stats, respectively, rounded down. Stat stage changes are unaffected.
moves.shortDescJa: Averages Attack and Special Attack with the target.
moves.descJa: Averages the user’s unmodified Attack with the target’s unmodified Attack; the value becomes the unmodified Attack for both Pokémon. Unmodified Special Attack is averaged the same way.

moves.name: Power Swap
moves.shortDesc: Swaps Attack and Sp. Atk stat stages with target.
moves.desc: The user swaps its Attack and Special Attack stat stage changes with the target.
moves.shortDescJa: User swaps Attack and Special Attack changes with the target.
moves.descJa: User swaps its Attack and Special Attack stat modifiers modifiers with the target.

moves.name: Power Trick
moves.shortDesc: Switches user's Attack and Defense stats.
moves.desc: The user swaps its Attack and Defense stats, and stat stage changes remain on their respective stats. This move can be used again to swap the stats back. If the user uses Baton Pass, the replacement will have its Attack and Defense stats swapped if the effect is active. If the user has its stats recalculated by changing forme while its stats are swapped, this effect is ignored but is still active for the purposes of Baton Pass.
moves.shortDescJa: User swaps Attack and Defense.
moves.descJa: The user’s original Attack and Defense are swapped.

moves.name: Power Trip
moves.shortDesc: + 20 power for each of the user's stat boosts.
moves.desc: Power is equal to 20+(X*20), where X is the user's total stat stage changes that are greater than 0.
moves.shortDescJa: Power is higher the more the user’s stats have been raised, to a maximum of 31×.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Power is increased by 100% its original value for every stage any of the user’s stats have been raised.  Accuracy, evasion, and lowered stats do not affect this move’s power.  For a Pokémon with all five stats modified to +6, this move’s power is 31×.

moves.name: Power Whip
moves.shortDesc: No additional effect.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Protect
moves.shortDesc: Prevents moves from affecting the user this turn.
moves.desc: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.
moves.descJa: No moves will hit the user for the remainder of this turn.  If the user is last to act this turn, this move will fail.

moves.name: Psych Up
moves.shortDesc: Copies the target's current stat stages.
moves.desc: The user copies all of the target's current stat stage changes.
moves.shortDescJa: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.
moves.descJa: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.

moves.name: Psychic
moves.shortDesc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: Psychic Fangs
moves.shortDesc: Destroys screens, unless the target is immune.
moves.desc: If this attack does not miss, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil end for the target's side of the field before damage is calculated.
moves.shortDescJa: Destroys Reflect and Light Screen.
moves.descJa: Destroys any Light Screen or Reflect on the target’s side of the field, then inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Psychic Noise
moves.shortDesc: For 2 turns, the target is prevented from healing.
moves.desc: For 2 turns, the target is prevented from restoring any HP as long as it remains active. During the effect, healing and draining moves are unusable, and Abilities and items that grant healing will not heal the user. If an affected Pokemon uses Baton Pass, the replacement will remain unable to restore its HP. Pain Split and the Regenerator Ability are unaffected.
moves.shortDescJa: For 2 turns, the target is prevented from healing.
moves.descJa: For 2 turns, the target is prevented from restoring any HP as long as it remains active. During the effect, healing and draining moves are unusable, and Abilities and items that grant healing will not heal the user. If an affected Pokemon uses Baton Pass, the replacement will remain unable to restore its HP. Pain Split and the Regenerator Ability are unaffected.

moves.name: Psychic Terrain
moves.shortDesc: 5 turns. Grounded: +Psychic power, priority-safe.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the terrain becomes Psychic Terrain. During the effect, the power of Psychic-type attacks made by grounded Pokemon is multiplied by 1.3 and grounded Pokemon cannot be hit by moves with priority greater than 0, unless the target is an ally. Camouflage transforms the user into a Psychic type, Nature Power becomes Psychic, and Secret Power has a 30% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage. Fails if the current terrain is Psychic Terrain.
moves.shortDescJa: Protects Pokémon on the ground from priority moves and increases the power of their  Psychic moves by 50%.
moves.descJa: Changes the terrain to Psychic Terrain for 5 turns.  Overrides Electric Terrain, Grassy Terrain, and Misty Terrain.

moves.name: Psycho Cut
moves.shortDesc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.desc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.
moves.shortDescJa: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.

moves.name: Psyshield Bash
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 100% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1.
moves.descJa: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1 stage.

moves.name: Psyshock
moves.shortDesc: Damages target based on Defense, not Sp. Def.
moves.desc: Deals damage to the target based on its Defense instead of Special Defense.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts damage based on the target’s Defense, not Special Defense.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Damage calculation always uses the target’s Defense, regardless of this move’s damage class.

moves.name: Quash
moves.shortDesc: Forces the target to move last this turn.
moves.desc: Causes the target to take its turn after all other Pokemon this turn, no matter the priority of its selected move. Fails if the target already moved this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: Makes the target act last this turn.
moves.descJa: Forces the target to act last this turn, regardless of Speed or move priority.  If the target has already acted this turn, this move will fail.

moves.name: Quick Attack
moves.shortDesc: Usually goes first.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Quick Guard
moves.shortDesc: Protects allies from priority attacks this turn.
moves.desc: The user and its party members are protected from attacks with original or altered priority greater than 0 made by other Pokemon, including allies, during this turn. This move modifies the same 1/X chance of being successful used by other protection moves, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used, but does not use the chance to check for failure. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn or if this move is already in effect for the user's side.
moves.shortDescJa: Prevents any priority moves from hitting friendly Pokémon this turn.
moves.descJa: Moves with priority greater than 0 will not hit friendly Pokémon for the remainder of this turn.  If the user is last to act this turn, this move will fail.

moves.name: Quiver Dance
moves.shortDesc: Raises the user's Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, Speed by 1.
moves.desc: Raises the user's Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises the user’s Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by one stage each.
moves.descJa: Raises the user’s Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed by one stage each.

moves.name: Rage Powder
moves.shortDesc: The foes' moves target the user on the turn used.
moves.desc: Until the end of the turn, all single-target attacks from the opposing side are redirected to the user. Such attacks are redirected to the user before they can be reflected by Magic Coat or the Magic Bounce Ability, or drawn in by the Lightning Rod or Storm Drain Abilities. Fails if it is not a Double Battle or Battle Royal. This effect is ignored while the user is under the effect of Sky Drop.
moves.shortDescJa: Redirects the target’s single-target effects to the user for this turn.
moves.descJa: Until the end of this turn, any moves that opposing Pokémon target solely at the user’s ally will instead target the user.  If both Pokémon on the same side of the field use this move on the same turn, the Pokémon that uses it last will become the target.

moves.name: Raging Bull
moves.shortDesc: Destroys screens. Type depends on user's form.
moves.desc: If this attack does not miss, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil end for the target's side of the field before damage is calculated. If the user's current form is a Paldean Tauros, this move's type changes to match. Fighting type for Combat Breed, Fire type for Blaze Breed, and Water type for Aqua Breed.
moves.shortDescJa: Destroys screens. Type depends on user's form.
moves.descJa: If this attack does not miss, the effects of Reflect, Light Screen, and Aurora Veil end for the target's side of the field before damage is calculated. If the user's current form is a Paldean Tauros, this move's type changes to match. Fighting type for Combat Breed, Fire type for Blaze Breed, and Water type for Aqua Breed.

moves.name: Raging Fury
moves.shortDesc: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
moves.desc: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.
moves.shortDescJa: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
moves.descJa: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.

moves.name: Rain Dance
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, heavy rain powers Water moves.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Rain Dance. The damage of Water-type attacks is multiplied by 1.5 and the damage of Fire-type attacks is multiplied by 0.5 during the effect. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Damp Rock. Fails if the current weather is Rain Dance.
moves.shortDescJa: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.
moves.descJa: Changes the weather to rain for five turns, during which Water moves inflict 50% extra damage, and Fire moves inflict half damage.

moves.name: Rapid Spin
moves.shortDesc: Free user from hazards/bind/Leech Seed; +1 Spe.
moves.desc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the effects of Leech Seed and binding moves end for the user, and all hazards are removed from the user's side of the field. Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Frees the user from binding moves, removes Leech Seed, and blows away Spikes.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Removes Leech Seed from the user, frees the user from Bind, Clamp, Fire Spin, Magma Storm, Sand Tomb, Whirlpool, and Wrap, and clears Spikes, Stealth Rock, and Toxic Spikes from the user’s side of the field.  If this move misses or has no effect, its effect doesn’t activate.

moves.name: Razor Shell
moves.shortDesc: 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: Recover
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user by 50% of its max HP.
moves.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.
moves.shortDescJa: Heals the user by half its max HP.
moves.descJa: Heals the user for half its max HP.

moves.name: Recycle
moves.shortDesc: Restores the item the user last used.
moves.desc: The user regains the item it last used. Fails if the user is holding an item, if the user has not held an item, if the item was a popped Air Balloon, if the item was picked up by a Pokemon with the Pickup Ability, or if the item was lost to Bug Bite, Corrosive Gas, Covet, Incinerate, Knock Off, Pluck, or Thief. Items thrown with Fling can be regained.
moves.shortDescJa: User recovers the item it last used up.
moves.descJa: User recovers the last item consumed by the user or a Pokémon in its position on the field.  The item must be used again before it can be recovered by this move again.  If the user is holding an item, this move fails.

moves.name: Reflect
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, physical damage to allies is halved.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the user and its party members take 0.5x damage from physical attacks, or 0.66x damage if in a Double Battle. Damage is not reduced further with Aurora Veil. Critical hits ignore this effect. It is removed from the user's side if the user or an ally is successfully hit by Brick Break, Psychic Fangs, or Defog.
