Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Light Clay. Fails if the effect is already active on the user's side.
moves.shortDescJa: Reduces damage from physical attacks by half.
moves.descJa: Erects a barrier around the user’s side of the field that reduces damage from physical attacks by half for five turns.  In double battles, the reduction is 1/3.  Critical hits are not affected by the barrier.

moves.name: Reflect Type
moves.shortDesc: User becomes the same type as the target.
moves.desc: Causes the user's types to become the same as the current types of the target. If the target's current types include typeless and a non-added type, typeless is ignored. If the target's current types include typeless and an added type from Forest's Curse or Trick-or-Treat, typeless is copied as the Normal type instead. Fails if the user is an Arceus or a Silvally, if the user is Terastallized, or if the target's current type is typeless alone.
moves.shortDescJa: User becomes the target’s type.
moves.descJa: User’s type changes to match the target’s.

moves.name: Rest
moves.shortDesc: User sleeps 2 turns and restores HP and status.
moves.desc: The user falls asleep for the next two turns and restores all of its HP, curing itself of any non-volatile status condition in the process. Fails if the user has full HP, is already asleep, or if another effect is preventing sleep.
moves.shortDescJa: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.
moves.descJa: User falls to sleep and immediately regains all its HP.  If the user has another major status effect, sleep will replace it.  The user will always wake up after two turns, or one turn with Early Bird.

moves.name: Reversal
moves.shortDesc: More power the less HP the user has left.
moves.desc: The power of this move is 20 if X is 33 to 48, 40 if X is 17 to 32, 80 if X is 10 to 16, 100 if X is 5 to 9, 150 if X is 2 to 4, and 200 if X is 0 or 1, where X is equal to (user's current HP * 48 / user's maximum HP), rounded down.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts more damage when the user has less HP remaining, with a maximum of 200 power.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Power varies inversely with the user’s proportional remaining HP.

moves.name: Rising Voltage
moves.shortDesc: 2x power if target is grounded in Electric Terrain.
moves.desc: If the current terrain is Electric Terrain and the target is grounded, this move's power is doubled.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Roar
moves.shortDesc: Forces the target to switch to a random ally.
moves.desc: The target is forced to switch out and be replaced with a random unfainted ally. Fails if the target is the last unfainted Pokemon in its party, or if the target used Ingrain previously or has the Suction Cups Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: Immediately ends wild battles.  Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.
moves.descJa: Switches the target out for another of its trainer’s Pokémon selected at random.  Wild battles end immediately.

moves.name: Rock Blast
moves.shortDesc: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.desc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.
moves.shortDescJa: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.

moves.name: Rock Polish
moves.shortDesc: Raises the user's Speed by 2.
moves.desc: Raises the user's Speed by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.
moves.descJa: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: Rock Slide
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to make the foe(s) flinch.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to make the target flinch.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Rock Tomb
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Speed by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: Rock Wrecker
moves.shortDesc: User cannot move next turn.
moves.desc: If this move is successful, the user must recharge on the following turn and cannot select a move.
moves.shortDescJa: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.

moves.name: Role Play
moves.shortDesc: User replaces its Ability with the target's.
moves.desc: The user's Ability changes to match the target's Ability. Fails if the user's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Zen Mode, Zero to Hero, or already matches the target, or if the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Flower Gift, Forecast, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Imposter, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Power of Alchemy, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, Receiver, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Trace, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.
moves.shortDescJa: Copies the target’s ability.
moves.descJa: User’s ability is replaced with the target’s until the user leaves the field.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.

moves.name: Roost
moves.shortDesc: Heals 50% HP. Flying-type removed 'til turn ends.
moves.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up. If the user is not Terastallized, until the end of the turn Flying-type users lose their Flying type and pure Flying-type users become Normal type. Does nothing if the user's HP is full.
moves.shortDescJa: Heals the user by half its max HP.
moves.descJa: Heals the user for half its max HP.  If the user is Flying, its Flying type is ignored until the end of this turn.

moves.name: Round
moves.shortDesc: Power doubles if others used Round this turn.
moves.desc: If there are other active Pokemon that chose this move for use this turn, those Pokemon take their turn immediately after the user, in Speed order, and this move's power is 120 for each other user.
moves.shortDescJa: Has double power if it’s used more than once per turn.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If Round has already been used this turn, this move’s power is doubled.  After this move is used, any other Pokémon using it this turn will immediately do so (in the order they would otherwise act), regardless of Speed or priority.  Pokémon using other moves will then continue to act as usual.

moves.name: Sacred Sword
moves.shortDesc: Ignores the target's stat stage changes.
moves.desc: Ignores the target's stat stage changes, including evasiveness.
moves.shortDescJa: Ignores the target’s stat modifiers.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Damage calculation ignores the target’s stat modifiers, including evasion.

moves.name: Safeguard
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, protects user's party from status.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the user and its party members cannot have non-volatile status conditions or confusion inflicted on them by other Pokemon. Pokemon on the user's side cannot become affected by Yawn but can fall asleep from its effect. It is removed from the user's side if the user or an ally is successfully hit by Defog. Fails if the effect is already active on the user's side.
moves.shortDescJa: Protects the user’s field from major status ailments and confusion for five turns.
moves.descJa: Protects Pokémon on the user’s side of the field from major status effects and confusion for five turns.  Does not cancel existing ailments.  This effect remains even if the user leaves the field.

moves.name: Salt Cure
moves.shortDesc: Deals 1/16 max HP each turn; 1/8 on Steel, Water.
moves.desc: Causes damage to the target equal to 1/16 of its maximum HP (1/8 if the target is Steel or Water type), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. This effect ends when the target is no longer active.
moves.shortDescJa: Deals 1/16 max HP each turn; 1/8 on Steel, Water.
moves.descJa: Causes damage to the target equal to 1/16 of its maximum HP (1/8 if the target is Steel or Water type), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. This effect ends when the target is no longer active.

moves.name: Sand Tomb
moves.shortDesc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.desc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.
moves.shortDescJa: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.

moves.name: Sandstorm
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, a sandstorm rages. Rock: 1.5x SpD.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Sandstorm. At the end of each turn except the last, all active Pokemon lose 1/16 of their maximum HP, rounded down, unless they are a Ground, Rock, or Steel type, or have the Magic Guard, Overcoat, Sand Force, Sand Rush, or Sand Veil Abilities. During the effect, the Special Defense of Rock-type Pokemon is multiplied by 1.5 when taking damage from a special attack. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Smooth Rock. Fails if the current weather is Sandstorm.
moves.shortDescJa: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns.
moves.descJa: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns.  Pokémon that are not Ground, Rock, or Steel take 1/16 their max HP at the end of every turn.  Every Rock Pokémon’s original Special Defense is raised by 50% for the duration of this effect.

moves.name: Scald
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to burn the target. Thaws target.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to burn the target. The target thaws out if it is frozen.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to burn the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to burn the target.

moves.name: Scale Shot
moves.shortDesc: Hits 2-5 times. User: -1 Def, +1 Spe after last hit.
moves.desc: Hits two to five times. Lowers the user's Defense by 1 stage and raises the user's Speed by 1 stage after the last hit. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.
moves.shortDescJa: Boosts the user’s Speed and lowers their Defense by one stage after inflicting damage two to five times in a row.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage two to five times in a row, raising the user’s Speed and lowering the user’s Defense by one stage each upon last hit.

moves.name: Scary Face
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.
moves.descJa: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: Scorching Sands
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to burn the target. Thaws target.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to burn the target. The target thaws out if it is frozen.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to burn the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to burn the target.

moves.name: Screech
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the target's Defense by 2.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Defense by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Defense by two stages.
moves.descJa: Lowers the target’s Defense by two stages.

moves.name: Seed Bomb
moves.shortDesc: No additional effect.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Seismic Toss
moves.shortDesc: Does damage equal to the user's level.
moves.desc: Deals damage to the target equal to the user's level.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level.
moves.descJa: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level.  Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored.

moves.name: Self-Destruct
moves.shortDesc: Hits adjacent Pokemon. The user faints.
moves.desc: The user faints after using this move, even if this move fails for having no target. This move is prevented from executing if any active Pokemon has the Damp Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: User faints.
moves.descJa: User faints, even if the attack fails or misses.  Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Shadow Ball
moves.shortDesc: 20% chance to lower the target's Sp. Def by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 20% chance to lower the target's Special Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: Shadow Claw
moves.shortDesc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.desc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.
moves.shortDescJa: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.

moves.name: Shadow Punch
moves.shortDesc: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.desc: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.shortDescJa: Never misses.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.

moves.name: Shadow Sneak
moves.shortDesc: Usually goes first.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Shed Tail
moves.shortDesc: User takes 1/2 its max HP to pass a substitute.
moves.desc: The user takes 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded up, and creates a substitute that has 1/4 of the user's maximum HP, rounded down. The user is replaced with another Pokemon in its party and the selected Pokemon has the substitute transferred to it. Fails if the user would faint, or if there are no unfainted party members.
moves.shortDescJa: User takes 1/2 its max HP to pass a substitute.
moves.descJa: The user takes 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded up, and creates a substitute that has 1/4 of the user's maximum HP, rounded down. The user is replaced with another Pokemon in its party and the selected Pokemon has the substitute transferred to it. Fails if the user would faint, or if there are no unfainted party members.

moves.name: Sheer Cold
moves.shortDesc: OHKOs non-Ice targets. Fails if user's lower level.
moves.desc: Deals damage to the target equal to the target's maximum HP. Ignores accuracy and evasiveness modifiers. This attack's accuracy is equal to (user's level - target's level + X)%, where X is 30 if the user is an Ice type and 20 otherwise, and fails if the target is at a higher level. Ice-type Pokemon and Pokemon with the Sturdy Ability are immune.
moves.shortDescJa: Causes a one-hit KO.
moves.descJa: Inflicts damage equal to the target’s max HP.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This move’s accuracy is 30% plus 1% for each level the user is higher than the target.  If the user is a lower level than the target, this move will fail.

moves.name: Shell Side Arm
moves.shortDesc: 20% psn. Physical+contact if it would be stronger.
moves.desc: Has a 20% chance to poison the target. This move becomes a physical attack that makes contact if the value of ((((2 * the user's level / 5 + 2) * 90 * X) / Y) / 50), where X is the user's Attack stat and Y is the target's Defense stat, is greater than the same value where X is the user's Special Attack stat and Y is the target's Special Defense stat. No stat modifiers other than stat stage changes are considered for this purpose. If the two values are equal, this move chooses a damage category at random.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Shell Smash
moves.shortDesc: Lowers Def, SpD by 1; raises Atk, SpA, Spe by 2.
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage. Raises the user's Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises user’s Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by two stages.  Lower user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage.
moves.descJa: Raises the user’s Attack, Special Attack, and Speed by two stages each.  Lowers the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage each.

moves.name: Shelter
moves.shortDesc: Raises the user's Defense by 2.
moves.desc: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises the user's Defense by 2.
moves.descJa: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.

moves.name: Simple Beam
moves.shortDesc: The target's Ability becomes Simple.
moves.desc: Causes the target's Ability to become Simple. Fails if the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Simple, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Truant, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.
moves.shortDescJa: Changes the target’s ability to Simple.
moves.descJa: Changes the target’s ability to Simple.

moves.name: Sing
moves.shortDesc: Causes the target to fall asleep.
moves.desc: Causes the target to fall asleep.
moves.shortDescJa: Puts the target to sleep.
moves.descJa: Puts the target to sleep.

moves.name: Skill Swap
moves.shortDesc: The user and the target trade Abilities.
moves.desc: The user swaps its Ability with the target's Ability. Fails if either the user or the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.
moves.shortDescJa: User and target swap abilities.
moves.descJa: User and target switch abilities.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.

moves.name: Skitter Smack
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower target's Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Sky Attack
moves.shortDesc: Charges, then hits turn 2. 30% flinch. High crit.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch and a higher chance for a critical hit. This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. If the user is holding a Power Herb, the move completes in one turn.
moves.shortDescJa: User charges for one turn before attacking.  Has a chance to make the target flinch.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User charges for one turn before attacking.  Critical hit chance is one level higher than normal.  Has a chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Slack Off
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user by 50% of its max HP.
moves.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.
moves.shortDescJa: Heals the user by half its max HP.
moves.descJa: Heals the user for half its max HP.

moves.name: Sleep Powder
moves.shortDesc: Causes the target to fall asleep.
moves.desc: Causes the target to fall asleep.
moves.shortDescJa: Puts the target to sleep.
moves.descJa: Puts the target to sleep.

moves.name: Sleep Talk
moves.shortDesc: User must be asleep. Uses another known move.
moves.desc: One of the user's known moves, besides this move, is selected for use at random. Fails if the user is not asleep. The selected move does not have PP deducted from it, and can currently have 0 PP. This move cannot select Assist, Beak Blast, Belch, Bide, Blazing Torque, Celebrate, Chatter, Combat Torque, Copycat, Dynamax Cannon, Focus Punch, Hold Hands, Magical Torque, Me First, Metronome, Mimic, Mirror Move, Nature Power, Noxious Torque, Shell Trap, Sketch, Sleep Talk, Struggle, Uproar, Wicked Torque, or any two-turn move.
moves.shortDescJa: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.
moves.descJa: Only usable if the user is sleeping.  Randomly selects and uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Use of the selected move requires and costs 0 PP.

moves.name: Sludge Bomb
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to poison the target.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to poison the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to poison the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to poison the target.

moves.name: Sludge Wave
moves.shortDesc: 10% chance to poison adjacent Pokemon.
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to poison the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to poison the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to poison the target.

moves.name: Smack Down
moves.shortDesc: Removes the target's Ground immunity.
moves.desc: This move can hit a target using Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop, or is under the effect of Sky Drop. If this move hits a target under the effect of Bounce, Fly, Magnet Rise, or Telekinesis, the effect ends. If the target is a Flying type that has not used Roost this turn or a Pokemon with the Levitate Ability, it loses its immunity to Ground-type attacks and the Arena Trap Ability as long as it remains active. During the effect, Magnet Rise fails for the target and Telekinesis fails against the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Removes any immunity to Ground damage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Removes the target’s immunity to Ground-type damage.  This effect removes any existing Ground immunity due to Levitate, Magnet Rise, or Telekinesis, and causes the target’s Flying type to be ignored when it takes Ground damage.

moves.name: Smart Strike
moves.shortDesc: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.desc: This move does not check accuracy.
moves.shortDescJa: Never misses.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.

moves.name: Snap Trap
moves.shortDesc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.desc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.
moves.shortDescJa: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.

moves.name: Snarl
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the foe(s) Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: Snore
moves.shortDesc: User must be asleep. 30% chance to flinch target.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch. Fails if the user is not asleep.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to make the target flinch.  Only works if the user is sleeping.
moves.descJa: Only usable if the user is sleeping.  Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Snowscape
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, snow falls. Ice: 1.5x Def.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Snow. During the effect, the Defense of Ice-type Pokemon is multiplied by 1.5 when taking damage from a physical attack. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Icy Rock. Fails if the current weather is Snow.
moves.shortDescJa: For 5 turns, snow falls. Ice: 1.5x Def.
moves.descJa: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Snow. During the effect, the Defense of Ice-type Pokemon is multiplied by 1.5 when taking damage from a physical attack. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Icy Rock. Fails if the current weather is Snow.

moves.name: Soak
moves.shortDesc: Changes the target's type to Water.
moves.desc: Causes the target to become a Water type. Fails if the target is an Arceus or a Silvally, if the target is already purely Water type, or if the target is Terastallized.
moves.shortDescJa: Changes the target’s type to Water.
moves.descJa: Changes the target to pure Water-type until it leaves the field.  If the target has Multitype, this move will fail.

moves.name: Soft-Boiled
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user by 50% of its max HP.
moves.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded half up.
moves.shortDescJa: Heals the user by half its max HP.
moves.descJa: Heals the user for half its max HP.

moves.name: Solar Beam
moves.shortDesc: Charges turn 1. Hits turn 2. No charge in sunlight.
moves.desc: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. Power is halved if the weather is Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Sandstorm, or Snow and the user is not holding Utility Umbrella. If the user is holding a Power Herb or the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, the move completes in one turn. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, the move still requires a turn to charge.
moves.shortDescJa: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User charges for one turn before attacking.

moves.name: Solar Blade
moves.shortDesc: Charges turn 1. Hits turn 2. No charge in sunlight.
moves.desc: This attack charges on the first turn and executes on the second. Power is halved if the weather is Hail, Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, or Sandstorm and the user is not holding Utility Umbrella. If the user is holding a Power Herb or the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, the move completes in one turn. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, the move still requires a turn to charge.
moves.shortDescJa: Requires a turn to charge before attacking.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User charges for one turn before attacking.

moves.name: Sparkling Aria
moves.shortDesc: The target is cured of its burn.
moves.desc: If the user has not fainted, the target is cured of its burn.
moves.shortDescJa: Cures the target of burns.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target has a burn and takes damage from this move, its burn is healed.

moves.name: Speed Swap
moves.shortDesc: Swaps Speed stat with target.
moves.desc: The user swaps its Speed stat with the target. Stat stage changes are unaffected.
moves.shortDescJa: Exchanges the user’s Speed with the target’s.
moves.descJa: Exchanges the original Speed stats of the user and target.

moves.name: Spicy Extract
moves.shortDesc: Raises target's Atk by 2 and lowers its Def by 2.
moves.desc: Raises the target's Attack by 2 stages and lowers its Defense by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises target's Atk by 2 and lowers its Def by 2.
moves.descJa: Raises the target's Attack by 2 stages and lowers its Defense by 2 stages.

moves.name: Spikes
moves.shortDesc: Hurts grounded foes on switch-in. Max 3 layers.
moves.desc: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in, unless it is a Flying-type Pokemon or has the Levitate Ability. Can be used up to three times before failing. Opponents lose 1/8 of their maximum HP with one layer, 1/6 of their maximum HP with two layers, and 1/4 of their maximum HP with three layers, all rounded down. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.
moves.shortDescJa: Scatters Spikes, hurting opposing Pokémon that switch in.
moves.descJa: Scatters spikes around the opposing field, which damage opposing Pokémon that enter the field for 1/8 of their max HP.  Pokémon immune to Ground moves are immune to this damage, except during Gravity.  Up to three layers of spikes may be laid down, adding 1/16 to the damage done: two layers of spikes damage for 3/16 max HP, and three layers damage for 1/4 max HP.

moves.name: Spiky Shield
moves.shortDesc: Protects from moves. Contact: loses 1/8 max HP.
moves.desc: The user is protected from most attacks made by other Pokemon during this turn, and Pokemon making contact with the user lose 1/8 of their maximum HP, rounded down. This move has a 1/X chance of being successful, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn.
moves.shortDescJa: Blocks damaging attacks and damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP.
moves.descJa: Blocks damaging attacks and damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP.

moves.name: Spirit Shackle
moves.shortDesc: Prevents the target from switching out.
moves.desc: Prevents the target from switching out. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field.
moves.shortDescJa: Traps the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Traps the target.

moves.name: Spit Up
moves.shortDesc: More power with more uses of Stockpile.
moves.desc: Power is equal to 100 times the user's Stockpile count. Fails if the user's Stockpile count is 0. Whether or not this move is successful, the user's Defense and Special Defense decrease by as many stages as Stockpile had increased them, and the user's Stockpile count resets to 0.
moves.shortDescJa: Power is 100 times the amount of energy Stockpiled.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Power is equal to 100 times the amount of energy stored by Stockpile.  Ignores the random factor in the damage formula.  Stored energy is consumed, and the user’s Defense and Special Defense are reset to what they would be if Stockpile had not been used.  If the user has no energy stored, this move will fail.

moves.name: Spite
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the PP of the target's last move by 4.
moves.desc: Causes the target's last move used to lose 4 PP. Fails if the target has not made a move, if the move has 0 PP, or if it no longer knows the move.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the PP of the target’s last used move by 4.
moves.descJa: Lowers the PP of the target’s last used move by 4.  If the target hasn’t used a move since entering the field, if it tried to use a move this turn and failed, or if its last used move has 0 PP remaining, this move will fail.

moves.name: Spore
moves.shortDesc: Causes the target to fall asleep.
moves.desc: Causes the target to fall asleep.
moves.shortDescJa: Puts the target to sleep.
moves.descJa: Puts the target to sleep.

moves.name: Stealth Rock
moves.shortDesc: Hurts foes on switch-in. Factors Rock weakness.
moves.desc: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in. Fails if the effect is already active on the opposing side. Foes lose 1/32, 1/16, 1/8, 1/4, or 1/2 of their maximum HP, rounded down, based on their weakness to the Rock type; 0.25x, 0.5x, neutral, 2x, or 4x, respectively. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.
moves.shortDescJa: Causes damage when opposing Pokémon switch in.
moves.descJa: Spreads sharp rocks around the opposing field, damaging any Pokémon that enters the field for 1/8 its max HP.  This damage is affected by the entering Pokémon’s susceptibility to Rock moves.

moves.name: Steel Beam
moves.shortDesc: User loses 50% max HP.
moves.desc: Whether or not this move is successful and even if it would cause fainting, the user loses 1/2 of its maximum HP, rounded up, unless the user has the Magic Guard Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts damage, and the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP, rounded up.
moves.descJa: Inflicts damage, and the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP, rounded up. The user still takes damage if the move is blocked by Protect or Substitute, misses, or if the target has Flash Fire.

moves.name: Steel Roller
moves.shortDesc: Fails if there is no terrain active. Ends the terrain.
moves.desc: Fails if there is no terrain active. Ends the effects of Electric Terrain, Grassy Terrain, Misty Terrain, and Psychic Terrain.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Steel Wing
moves.shortDesc: 10% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to raise the user's Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to raise the user’s Defense by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage. Has a chance to raise the user’s Defense one stage.

moves.name: Sticky Web
moves.shortDesc: Lowers Speed of grounded foes by 1 on switch-in.
moves.desc: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, lowering the Speed by 1 stage of each opposing Pokemon that switches in, unless it is a Flying-type Pokemon or has the Levitate Ability. Fails if the effect is already active on the opposing side. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.
moves.shortDescJa: Covers the opposing field, lowering opponents’ Speed by one stage upon switching in.
moves.descJa: Shoots a web over the opponents’ side of the field, which lowers the Speed of any opposing Pokémon that enters the field by one stage.

moves.name: Stockpile
moves.shortDesc: Raises user's Defense, Sp. Def by 1. Max 3 uses.
moves.desc: Raises the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage. The user's Stockpile count increases by 1. Fails if the user's Stockpile count is 3. The user's Stockpile count is reset to 0 when it is no longer active.
moves.shortDescJa: Stores energy up to three times for use with Spit Up and Swallow.
moves.descJa: Raises the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage each.  Stores energy for use with Spit Up and Swallow.  Up to three levels of energy can be stored, and all are lost if the user leaves the field.  Energy is still stored even if the stat boosts cannot be applied.

moves.name: Stomping Tantrum
moves.shortDesc: Power doubles if the user's last move failed.
moves.desc: Power doubles if the user's last move on the previous turn, including moves called by other moves or those used through Instruct, Magic Coat, Snatch, or the Dancer or Magic Bounce Abilities, failed to do any of its normal effects, not including damage from an unsuccessful High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, or Mind Blown, or if the user was prevented from moving by any effect other than recharging or Sky Drop. A move that was blocked by Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, Spiky Shield, Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard will not double this move's power, nor will Bounce or Fly ending early due to the effect of Gravity, Smack Down, or Thousand Arrows.
moves.shortDescJa: Has double power if the user’s last move failed.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Power is doubled if the user’s last move failed for any reason (i.e., produced the message "But it failed!") or was ineffective due to types.

moves.name: Stone Axe
moves.shortDesc: Sets Stealth Rock on the target's side.
moves.desc: If this move is successful, it sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in. Foes lose 1/32, 1/16, 1/8, 1/4, or 1/2 of their maximum HP, rounded down, based on their weakness to the Rock type; 0.25x, 0.5x, neutral, 2x, or 4x, respectively. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.
moves.shortDescJa: Sets Stealth Rock on the target's side.
moves.descJa: If this move is successful, it sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, damaging each opposing Pokemon that switches in. Foes lose 1/32, 1/16, 1/8, 1/4, or 1/2 of their maximum HP, rounded down, based on their weakness to the Rock type; 0.25x, 0.5x, neutral, 2x, or 4x, respectively. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, or is hit by Defog.

moves.name: Stone Edge
moves.shortDesc: High critical hit ratio.
moves.desc: Has a higher chance for a critical hit.
moves.shortDescJa: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.

moves.name: Stored Power
moves.shortDesc: + 20 power for each of the user's stat boosts.
moves.desc: Power is equal to 20+(X*20), where X is the user's total stat stage changes that are greater than 0.
moves.shortDescJa: Power is higher the more the user’s stats have been raised, to a maximum of 31×.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Power is increased by 100% its original value for every stage any of the user’s stats have been raised.  Accuracy, evasion, and lowered stats do not affect this move’s power.  For a Pokémon with all five stats modified to +6, this move’s power is 31×.

moves.name: Storm Throw
moves.shortDesc: Always results in a critical hit.
moves.desc: This move is always a critical hit unless the target is under the effect of Lucky Chant or has the Battle Armor or Shell Armor Abilities.
moves.shortDescJa: Always scores a critical hit.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Always scores a critical hit.

moves.name: Strength Sap
moves.shortDesc: User heals HP=target's Atk stat. Lowers Atk by 1.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Attack by 1 stage. The user restores its HP equal to the target's Attack stat calculated with its stat stage before this move was used. If Big Root is held by the user, the HP recovered is 1.3x normal, rounded half down. Fails if the target's Attack stat stage is -6.
moves.shortDescJa: Heals the user by the target’s current Attack stat and lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.
moves.descJa: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.  Heals the user by the target’s current Attack, including modifiers, but not including this move’s Attack-lowering effect.

moves.name: String Shot
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the foe(s) Speed by 2.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.
moves.descJa: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: Struggle
moves.shortDesc: User loses 1/4 of its max HP.
moves.desc: Deals typeless damage to a random opposing Pokemon. If this move was successful, the user loses 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded half up, and the Rock Head Ability does not prevent this. This move is automatically used if none of the user's known moves can be selected.
moves.shortDescJa: User takes 1/4 its max HP in recoil.
moves.descJa: Inflicts typeless regular damage.  User takes 1/4 its max HP in recoil.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.

moves.name: Struggle Bug
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the foe(s) Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: Stuff Cheeks
moves.shortDesc: Fails unless the user has a berry. User eats Berry, Def +2.
moves.desc: Fails if the user is not holding a Berry. The user eats its Berry and raises its Defense by 2 stages. This effect is not prevented by the Klutz or Unnerve Abilities, or the effects of Embargo or Magic Room.
moves.shortDescJa: Cures the entire party of major status effects after inflicting damage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage, then (if successful) removes major status effects from every Pokémon in the user’s party.

moves.name: Stun Spore
moves.shortDesc: Paralyzes the target.
moves.desc: Paralyzes the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Paralyzes the target.
moves.descJa: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: Substitute
moves.shortDesc: User takes 1/4 its max HP to put in a substitute.
moves.desc: The user takes 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down, and puts it into a substitute to take its place in battle. The substitute is removed once enough damage is inflicted on it, if the user switches out or faints, or if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up. Baton Pass can be used to transfer the substitute to an ally, and the substitute will keep its remaining HP. Until the substitute is broken, it receives damage from all attacks made by other Pokemon and shields the user from status effects and stat stage changes caused by other Pokemon. Sound-based moves and Pokemon with the Infiltrator Ability ignore substitutes. The user still takes normal damage from weather and status effects while behind its substitute. If the substitute breaks during a multi-hit attack, the user will take damage from any remaining hits. If a substitute is created while the user is trapped by a binding move, the binding effect ends immediately. Fails if the user does not have enough HP remaining to create a substitute without fainting, or if it already has a substitute.
moves.shortDescJa: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.
moves.descJa: Transfers 1/4 the user’s max HP into a doll that absorbs damage and causes most negative move effects to fail.  If the user leaves the field, the doll will vanish.  If the user cannot pay the HP cost, this move will fail.

moves.name: Sucker Punch
moves.shortDesc: Usually goes first. Fails if target is not attacking.
moves.desc: Fails if the target did not select a physical attack, special attack, or Me First for use this turn, or if the target moves before the user.
moves.shortDescJa: Only works if the target is about to use a damaging move.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target has not selected a damaging move this turn, or if the target has already acted this turn, this move will fail.

moves.name: Sunny Day
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, intense sunlight powers Fire moves.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the weather becomes Sunny Day. The damage of Fire-type attacks is multiplied by 1.5 and the damage of Water-type attacks is multiplied by 0.5 during the effect. Lasts for 8 turns if the user is holding Heat Rock. Fails if the current weather is Sunny Day.
moves.shortDescJa: Changes the weather to sunny for five turns.
moves.descJa: Changes the weather to sunshine for five turns, during which Fire moves inflict 50% extra damage, and Water moves inflict half damage.

moves.name: Super Fang
moves.shortDesc: Does damage equal to 1/2 target's current HP.
moves.desc: Deals damage to the target equal to half of its current HP, rounded down, but not less than 1 HP.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts damage equal to half the target’s HP.
moves.descJa: Inflicts typeless damage equal to half the target’s remaining HP.

moves.name: Supercell Slam
moves.shortDesc: User is hurt by 50% of its max HP if it misses.
moves.desc: If this attack is not successful, the user loses half of its maximum HP, rounded down, as crash damage. Pokemon with the Magic Guard Ability are unaffected by crash damage. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.
moves.shortDescJa: User is hurt by 50% of its max HP if it misses.
moves.descJa: If this attack is not successful, the user loses half of its maximum HP, rounded down, as crash damage. Pokemon with the Magic Guard Ability are unaffected by crash damage. Damage doubles and no accuracy check is done if the target has used Minimize while active.

moves.name: Superpower
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the user's Attack and Defense by 1.
moves.desc: Lowers the user's Attack and Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage after inflicting damage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage each.

moves.name: Surf
moves.shortDesc: Hits adjacent Pokemon. Double damage on Dive.
moves.desc: Damage doubles if the target is using Dive.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Dive users.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Swagger
moves.shortDesc: Raises the target's Attack by 2 and confuses it.
moves.desc: Raises the target's Attack by 2 stages and confuses it.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages and confuses the target.
moves.descJa: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages, then confuses it.  If the target’s Attack cannot be raised by two stages, the confusion is not applied.

moves.name: Swallow
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user based on uses of Stockpile.
moves.desc: The user restores its HP based on its Stockpile count. Restores 1/4 of its maximum HP if it's 1, 1/2 of its maximum HP if it's 2, both rounded half down, and all of its HP if it's 3. Fails if the user's Stockpile count is 0. The user's Defense and Special Defense decrease by as many stages as Stockpile had increased them, and the user's Stockpile count resets to 0.
moves.shortDescJa: Recovers 1/4 HP after one Stockpile, 1/2 HP after two Stockpiles, or full HP after three Stockpiles.
moves.descJa: Heals the user depending on the amount of energy stored by Stockpile: 1/4 its max HP after one use, 1/2 its max HP after two uses, or fully after three uses.  Stored energy is consumed, and the user’s Defense and Special Defense are reset to what they would be if Stockpile had not been used.  If the user has no energy stored, this move will fail.

moves.name: Sweet Kiss
moves.shortDesc: Causes the target to become confused.
moves.desc: Causes the target to become confused.
moves.shortDescJa: Confuses the target.
moves.descJa: Confuses the target.

moves.name: Sweet Scent
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the foe(s) evasiveness by 2.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's evasiveness by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s evasion by one stage.
moves.descJa: Lowers the target’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: Switcheroo
moves.shortDesc: User switches its held item with the target's.
moves.desc: The user swaps its held item with the target's held item. Fails if either the user or the target is holding a Mail or Z-Crystal, if neither is holding an item, if the user is trying to give or take a Mega Stone to or from the species that can Mega Evolve with it, or if the user is trying to give or take a Blue Orb, a Red Orb, a Griseous Orb, a Plate, a Drive, or a Memory to or from a Kyogre, a Groudon, a Giratina, an Arceus, a Genesect, or a Silvally, respectively. The target is immune to this move if it has the Sticky Hold Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: User and target swap items.
moves.descJa: User and target permanently swap held items.  Works even if one of the Pokémon isn’t holding anything.  If either Pokémon is holding mail, this move will fail.

moves.name: Swords Dance
moves.shortDesc: Raises the user's Attack by 2.
moves.desc: Raises the user's Attack by 2 stages.
moves.shortDescJa: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages.
moves.descJa: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages.

moves.name: Synthesis
moves.shortDesc: Heals the user by a weather-dependent amount.
moves.desc: The user restores 1/2 of its maximum HP if Delta Stream or no weather conditions are in effect or if the user is holding Utility Umbrella, 2/3 of its maximum HP if the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, and 1/4 of its maximum HP if the weather is Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Sandstorm, or Snow, all rounded half down.
moves.shortDescJa: Heals the user by half its max HP.  Affected by weather.
moves.descJa: Heals the user for half its max HP.

moves.name: Syrup Bomb
moves.shortDesc: Target's Speed is lowered by 1 stage for 3 turns.
moves.desc: If this move is successful, it causes the target's Speed to be lowered by 1 stage at the end of each turn for 3 turns.
moves.shortDescJa: Target's Speed is lowered by 1 stage for 3 turns.
moves.descJa: If this move is successful, it causes the target's Speed to be lowered by 1 stage at the end of each turn for 3 turns.

moves.name: Tail Slap
moves.shortDesc: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.desc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.
moves.shortDescJa: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.

moves.name: Tailwind
moves.shortDesc: For 4 turns, allies' Speed is doubled.
moves.desc: For 4 turns, the user and its party members have their Speed doubled. Fails if this move is already in effect for the user's side.
moves.shortDescJa: For three turns, friendly Pokémon have doubled Speed.
moves.descJa: For the next three turns, all Pokémon on the user’s side of the field have their original Speed doubled.  This effect remains if the user leaves the field.

moves.name: Taunt
moves.shortDesc: Target can't use status moves its next 3 turns.
moves.desc: Prevents the target from using non-damaging moves for its next three turns. Pokemon with the Oblivious Ability or protected by the Aroma Veil Ability are immune.
moves.shortDescJa: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.
moves.descJa: Target is forced to only use damaging moves for the next 3–5 turns, selected at random.  Moves that select other moves not known in advance do not count as damaging.

moves.name: Tearful Look
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the target's Attack and Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage.
moves.descJa: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage each.

moves.name: Teatime
moves.shortDesc: All active Pokemon consume held Berries.
moves.desc: All active Pokemon consume their held Berries. This effect is not prevented by substitutes, the Klutz or Unnerve Abilities, or the effects of Embargo or Magic Room. Fails if no active Pokemon is holding a Berry.
moves.shortDescJa: All active Pokemon consume held Berries.
moves.descJa: All active Pokemon consume their held Berries. This effect is not prevented by substitutes, the Klutz or Unnerve Abilities, or the effects of Embargo or Magic Room. Fails if no active Pokemon is holding a Berry.

moves.name: Teeter Dance
moves.shortDesc: Confuses adjacent Pokemon.
moves.desc: Causes the target to become confused.
moves.shortDescJa: Confuses the target.
moves.descJa: Confuses all targets.

moves.name: Temper Flare
moves.shortDesc: Power doubles if the user's last move failed.
moves.desc: Power doubles if the user's last move on the previous turn, including moves called by other moves or those used through Instruct, Magic Coat, Snatch, or the Dancer or Magic Bounce Abilities, failed to do any of its normal effects, not including damage from an unsuccessful High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, or Mind Blown, or if the user was prevented from moving by any effect other than recharging or Sky Drop. A move that was blocked by Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, Spiky Shield, Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard will not double this move's power, nor will Bounce or Fly ending early due to the effect of Gravity, Smack Down, or Thousand Arrows.
moves.shortDescJa: Power doubles if the user's last move failed.
moves.descJa: Power doubles if the user's last move on the previous turn, including moves called by other moves or those used through Instruct, Magic Coat, Snatch, or the Dancer or Magic Bounce Abilities, failed to do any of its normal effects, not including damage from an unsuccessful High Jump Kick, Jump Kick, or Mind Blown, or if the user was prevented from moving by any effect other than recharging or Sky Drop. A move that was blocked by Baneful Bunker, Detect, King's Shield, Protect, Spiky Shield, Crafty Shield, Mat Block, Quick Guard, or Wide Guard will not double this move's power, nor will Bounce or Fly ending early due to the effect of Gravity, Smack Down, or Thousand Arrows.

moves.name: Terrain Pulse
moves.shortDesc: User on terrain: power doubles, type varies.
moves.desc: Power doubles if the user is grounded and a terrain is active, and this move's type changes to match. Electric type during Electric Terrain, Grass type during Grassy Terrain, Fairy type during Misty Terrain, and Psychic type during Psychic Terrain.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Thief
moves.shortDesc: If the user has no item, it steals the target's.
moves.desc: If this attack was successful and the user has not fainted, it steals the target's held item if the user is not holding one. The target's item is not stolen if it is a Mail or Z-Crystal, or if the target is a Kyogre holding a Blue Orb, a Groudon holding a Red Orb, a Giratina holding a Griseous Orb, an Arceus holding a Plate, a Genesect holding a Drive, a Silvally holding a Memory, or a Pokemon that can Mega Evolve holding the Mega Stone for its species. Items lost to this move cannot be regained with Recycle or the Harvest Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: Takes the target’s item.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target is holding an item and the user is not, the user will permanently take the item.  Damage is still inflicted if an item cannot be taken.

moves.name: Thrash
moves.shortDesc: Lasts 2-3 turns. Confuses the user afterwards.
moves.desc: The user spends two or three turns locked into this move and becomes confused immediately after its move on the last turn of the effect if it is not already. This move targets an opposing Pokemon at random on each turn. If the user is prevented from moving, is asleep at the beginning of a turn, or the attack is not successful against the target on the first turn of the effect or the second turn of a three-turn effect, the effect ends without causing confusion. If this move is called by Sleep Talk and the user is asleep, the move is used for one turn and does not confuse the user.
moves.shortDescJa: Hits every turn for 2-3 turns, then confuses the user.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to attack with this move for 2–3 turns,selected at random.  After the last hit, the user becomes confused.

moves.name: Throat Chop
moves.shortDesc: For 2 turns, the target cannot use sound moves.
moves.desc: For 2 turns, the target cannot use sound-based moves.
moves.shortDescJa: Prevents the target from using sound-based moves for two turns.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Silences the target for two turns, preventing it from using any sound-based moves.

moves.name: Thunder
moves.shortDesc: 30% chance to paralyze. Can't miss in rain.
moves.desc: Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target. This move can hit a target using Bounce, Fly, or Sky Drop, or is under the effect of Sky Drop. If the weather is Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, this move does not check accuracy. If the weather is Desolate Land or Sunny Day, this move's accuracy is 50%. If this move is used against a Pokemon holding Utility Umbrella, this move's accuracy remains at 70%.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to paralyze the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: Thunder Fang
moves.shortDesc: 10% chance to paralyze. 10% chance to flinch.
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target and a 10% chance to make it flinch.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to paralyze the target and a chance to make the target flinch.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to paralyze the target and a separate chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Thunder Punch
moves.shortDesc: 10% chance to paralyze the target.
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to paralyze the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: Thunder Wave
moves.shortDesc: Paralyzes the target.
moves.desc: Paralyzes the target. This move does not ignore type immunity.
moves.shortDescJa: Paralyzes the target.
moves.descJa: Paralyzes the target.

moves.name: Thunderbolt
moves.shortDesc: 10% chance to paralyze the target.
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to paralyze the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: Tickle
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the target's Attack and Defense by 1.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Attack and Defense by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Attack and Defense by one stage.
moves.descJa: Lowers the target’s Attack and Defense by one stage.

moves.name: Tidy Up
moves.shortDesc: User +1 Atk, Spe. Clears all substitutes/hazards.
moves.desc: Raises the user's Attack and Speed by 1 stage. Removes substitutes from all active Pokemon and ends the effects of Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, and Toxic Spikes for both sides.
moves.shortDescJa: User +1 Atk, Spe. Clears all substitutes/hazards.
moves.descJa: Raises the user's Attack and Speed by 1 stage. Removes substitutes from all active Pokemon and ends the effects of Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, and Toxic Spikes for both sides.

moves.name: Torch Song
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to raise the user's Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Special Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 100% chance to raise the user's Sp. Atk by 1.
moves.descJa: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Special Attack by 1 stage.

moves.name: Torment
moves.shortDesc: Target can't select the same move twice in a row.
moves.desc: Prevents the target from selecting the same move for use two turns in a row. This effect ends when the target is no longer active.
moves.shortDescJa: Prevents the target from using the same move twice in a row.
moves.descJa: Prevents the target from attempting to use the same move twice in a row.  When the target leaves the field, this effect ends.

moves.name: Toxic
moves.shortDesc: Badly poisons the target. Poison types can't miss.
moves.desc: Badly poisons the target. If a Poison-type Pokemon uses this move, the target cannot avoid the attack, even if the target is in the middle of a two-turn move.
moves.shortDescJa: Badly poisons the target, inflicting more damage every turn.
moves.descJa: Badly poisons the target.  Never misses when used by a Poison-type Pokémon.

moves.name: Toxic Spikes
moves.shortDesc: Poisons grounded foes on switch-in. Max 2 layers.
moves.desc: Sets up a hazard on the opposing side of the field, poisoning each opposing Pokemon that switches in, unless it is a Flying-type Pokemon or has the Levitate Ability. Can be used up to two times before failing. Opposing Pokemon become poisoned with one layer and badly poisoned with two layers. Can be removed from the opposing side if any Pokemon uses Tidy Up, or if any opposing Pokemon uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Defog successfully, is hit by Defog, or a grounded Poison-type Pokemon switches in. Safeguard prevents the opposing party from being poisoned on switch-in, but a substitute does not.
moves.shortDescJa: Scatters poisoned spikes, poisoning opposing Pokémon that switch in.
moves.descJa: Scatters poisoned spikes around the opposing field, which poison opposing Pokémon that enter the field.  A second layer of these spikes may be laid down, in which case Pokémon will be badly poisoned instead.  Pokémon immune to either Ground moves or being poisoned are immune to this effect.  Pokémon otherwise immune to Ground moves are affected during Gravity.

moves.name: Toxic Thread
moves.shortDesc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 and poisons it.
moves.desc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages and poisons it.
moves.shortDescJa: Poisons the target and lowers its Speed by one stage.
moves.descJa: Poisons the target and lowers its Speed by one stage.

moves.name: Trailblaze
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1.
moves.descJa: Has a 100% chance to raise the user's Speed by 1 stage.

moves.name: Transform
moves.shortDesc: Copies target's stats, moves, types, and Ability.
moves.desc: The user transforms into the target. The target's current stats, stat stages, types, moves, Ability, weight, gender, and sprite are copied. The user's level and HP remain the same and each copied move receives only 5 PP, with a maximum of 5 PP each. The user can no longer change formes if it would have the ability to do so. This move fails if it hits a substitute, if either the user or the target is already transformed, or if either is behind an Illusion.
moves.shortDescJa: User becomes a copy of the target until it leaves battle.
moves.descJa: User copies the target’s species, weight, type, ability, calculated stats (except HP), and moves.  Copied moves will all have 5 PP remaining.  IVs are copied for the purposes of Hidden Power, but stats are not recalculated.

moves.name: Tri Attack
moves.shortDesc: 20% chance to paralyze or burn or freeze target.
moves.desc: Has a 20% chance to either burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.  One of these effects is selected at random; they do not each have independent chances to occur.

moves.name: Trick
moves.shortDesc: User switches its held item with the target's.
moves.desc: The user swaps its held item with the target's held item. Fails if either the user or the target is holding a Mail or Z-Crystal, if neither is holding an item, if the user is trying to give or take a Mega Stone to or from the species that can Mega Evolve with it, or if the user is trying to give or take a Blue Orb, a Red Orb, a Griseous Orb, a Plate, a Drive, or a Memory to or from a Kyogre, a Groudon, a Giratina, an Arceus, a Genesect, or a Silvally, respectively. The target is immune to this move if it has the Sticky Hold Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: User and target swap items.
moves.descJa: User and target permanently swap held items.  Works even if one of the Pokémon isn’t holding anything.  If either Pokémon is holding mail, this move will fail.

moves.name: Trick Room
moves.shortDesc: Goes last. For 5 turns, turn order is reversed.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, the Speed of every Pokemon is recalculated for the purposes of determining turn order. During the effect, each Pokemon's Speed is considered to be (10000 - its normal Speed), and if this value is greater than 8191, 8192 is subtracted from it. If this move is used during the effect, the effect ends.
moves.shortDescJa: For five turns, slower Pokémon will act before faster Pokémon.
moves.descJa: For five turns (including this one), slower Pokémon will act before faster Pokémon.  Move priority is not affected.  Using this move when its effect is already active will end the effect.

moves.name: Trick-or-Treat
moves.shortDesc: Adds Ghost to the target's type(s).
moves.desc: Causes the Ghost type to be added to the target, effectively making it have two or three types. Fails if the target is already a Ghost type. If Forest's Curse adds a type to the target, it replaces the type added by this move and vice versa.
moves.shortDescJa: Adds Ghost to the target’s types.
moves.descJa: Adds Ghost to the target’s types.

moves.name: Triple Arrows
moves.shortDesc: High crit. Target: 50% -1 Defense, 30% flinch.
moves.desc: Has a 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage, a 30% chance to make it flinch, and a higher chance for a critical hit.
moves.shortDescJa: High crit. Target: 50% -1 Defense, 30% flinch.
moves.descJa: Has a 50% chance to lower the target's Defense by 1 stage, a 30% chance to make it flinch, and a higher chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: Triple Axel
moves.shortDesc: Hits 3 times. Each hit can miss, but power rises.
moves.desc: Hits three times. Power increases to 40 for the second hit and 60 for the third. This move checks accuracy for each hit, and the attack ends if the target avoids a hit. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit three times.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Trop Kick
moves.shortDesc: 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to lower the target's Attack by 1 stage.
moves.shortDescJa: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.

moves.name: Twin Beam
moves.shortDesc: Hits 2 times in one turn.
moves.desc: Hits twice. If the first hit breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the second hit.
moves.shortDescJa: Hits 2 times in one turn.
moves.descJa: Hits twice. If the first hit breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the second hit.

moves.name: U-turn
moves.shortDesc: User switches out after damaging the target.
moves.desc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if there are no unfainted party members, or if the target switched out using an Eject Button or through the effect of the Emergency Exit or Wimp Out Abilities.
moves.shortDescJa: User must switch out after attacking.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage, then the user immediately switches out, and the trainer selects a replacement Pokémon from the party.  If the target faints from this attack, the user’s trainer selects the new Pokémon to send out first.  If the user is the last Pokémon in its party that can battle, it will not switch out.

moves.name: Upper Hand
moves.shortDesc: 100% flinch. Fails unless target using priority.
moves.desc: Has a 100% chance to make the target flinch. Fails if the target did not select a priority move for use this turn, or if the target moves before the user.
moves.shortDescJa: 100% flinch. Fails unless target using priority.
moves.descJa: Has a 100% chance to make the target flinch. Fails if the target did not select a priority move for use this turn, or if the target moves before the user.

moves.name: Uproar
moves.shortDesc: Lasts 3 turns. Active Pokemon cannot fall asleep.
moves.desc: The user spends three turns locked into this move. This move targets an opponent at random on each turn. On the first of the three turns, all sleeping active Pokemon wake up. During the three turns, no active Pokemon can fall asleep by any means, and Pokemon switched in during the effect do not wake up. If the user is prevented from moving or the attack is not successful against the target during one of the turns, the effect ends.
moves.shortDescJa: Forced to use this move for several turns.  Pokémon cannot fall asleep in that time.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to use this move for 2–5 turns, selected at random.  All Pokémon on the field wake up, and none can fall to sleep until the lock-in ends.

moves.name: Vacuum Wave
moves.shortDesc: Usually goes first.
moves.desc: No additional effect.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.

moves.name: Venoshock
moves.shortDesc: Power doubles if the target is poisoned.
moves.desc: Power doubles if the target is poisoned.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts double damage if the target is Poisoned.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target is poisoned, this move has double power.

moves.name: Volt Switch
moves.shortDesc: User switches out after damaging the target.
moves.desc: If this move is successful and the user has not fainted, the user switches out even if it is trapped and is replaced immediately by a selected party member. The user does not switch out if there are no unfainted party members, or if the target switched out using an Eject Button or through the effect of the Emergency Exit or Wimp Out Abilities.
moves.shortDescJa: User must switch out after attacking.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage, then the user immediately switches out, and the trainer selects a replacement Pokémon from the party.  If the target faints from this attack, the user’s trainer selects the new Pokémon to send out first.  If the user is the last Pokémon in its party that can battle, it will not switch out.

moves.name: Volt Tackle
moves.shortDesc: Has 33% recoil. 10% chance to paralyze target.
moves.desc: Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target. If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.
moves.shortDescJa: User takes 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.  Has a chance to paralyze the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User takes 1/3 the damage it inflicts in recoil.  Has a chance to paralyze the target.

moves.name: Water Pulse
moves.shortDesc: 20% chance to confuse the target.
moves.desc: Has a 20% chance to confuse the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to confuse the target.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: Water Shuriken
moves.shortDesc: Usually goes first. Hits 2-5 times in one turn.
moves.desc: Hits two to five times. Has a 35% chance to hit two or three times and a 15% chance to hit four or five times. If one of the hits breaks the target's substitute, it will take damage for the remaining hits. If the user has the Skill Link Ability, this move will always hit five times. If the user is an Ash-Greninja with the Battle Bond Ability, this move has a power of 20 and always hits three times. If the user is holding Loaded Dice, this move will hit 4-5 times.
moves.shortDescJa: Hits 2–5 times.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times.

moves.name: Water Spout
moves.shortDesc: Less power as user's HP decreases. Hits foe(s).
moves.desc: Power is equal to (user's current HP * 150 / user's maximum HP), rounded down, but not less than 1.
moves.shortDescJa: Inflicts more damage when the user has more HP remaining, with a maximum of 150 power.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Power increases with the user’s remaining HP and is given by `150 * HP / max HP`, to a maximum of 150 when the user has full HP.

moves.name: Waterfall
moves.shortDesc: 20% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.desc: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.
moves.shortDescJa: Has a chance to make the target flinch.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: Wave Crash
moves.shortDesc: Has 33% recoil.
moves.desc: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.
moves.shortDescJa: Has 33% recoil.
moves.descJa: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.

moves.name: Weather Ball
moves.shortDesc: Power doubles and type varies in each weather.
moves.desc: Power doubles if a weather condition other than Delta Stream is active, and this move's type changes to match. Ice type during Snow, Water type during Primordial Sea or Rain Dance, Rock type during Sandstorm, and Fire type during Desolate Land or Sunny Day. If the user is holding Utility Umbrella and uses Weather Ball during Primordial Sea, Rain Dance, Desolate Land, or Sunny Day, this move remains Normal type and does not double in power.
moves.shortDescJa: If there be weather, this move has doubled power and the weather’s type.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  If a weather move is active, this move has double power, and its type becomes the type of the weather move.  Shadow Sky is typeless for the purposes of this move.

moves.name: Whirlpool
moves.shortDesc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.desc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch. The effect ends if either the user or the target leaves the field, or if the target uses Mortal Spin, Rapid Spin, or Substitute successfully. This effect is not stackable or reset by using this or another binding move.
moves.shortDescJa: Prevents the target from leaving battle and inflicts 1/16 its max HP in damage for 2-5 turns.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.

moves.name: Whirlwind
moves.shortDesc: Forces the target to switch to a random ally.
moves.desc: The target is forced to switch out and be replaced with a random unfainted ally. Fails if the target is the last unfainted Pokemon in its party, or if the target used Ingrain previously or has the Suction Cups Ability.
moves.shortDescJa: Immediately ends wild battles.  Forces trainers to switch Pokémon.
moves.descJa: Switches the target out for another of its trainer’s Pokémon selected at random.  Wild battles end immediately.

moves.name: Wide Guard
moves.shortDesc: Protects allies from multi-target moves this turn.
moves.desc: The user and its party members are protected from moves made by other Pokemon, including allies, during this turn that target all adjacent foes or all adjacent Pokemon. This move modifies the same 1/X chance of being successful used by other protection moves, where X starts at 1 and triples each time this move is successfully used, but does not use the chance to check for failure. X resets to 1 if this move fails, if the user's last move used is not Baneful Bunker, Burning Bulwark, Detect, Endure, King's Shield, Max Guard, Obstruct, Protect, Quick Guard, Silk Trap, Spiky Shield, or Wide Guard, or if it was one of those moves and the user's protection was broken. Fails if the user moves last this turn or if this move is already in effect for the user's side.
moves.shortDescJa: Prevents any multi-target moves from hitting friendly Pokémon this turn.
moves.descJa: Moves with multiple targets will not hit friendly Pokémon for the remainder of this turn.  If the user is last to act this turn, this move will fail.

moves.name: Wild Charge
moves.shortDesc: Has 1/4 recoil.
moves.desc: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 1/4 the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.
moves.shortDescJa: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User takes 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: Will-O-Wisp
moves.shortDesc: Burns the target.
moves.desc: Burns the target.
moves.shortDescJa: Burns the target.
moves.descJa: Burns the target.

moves.name: Wish
moves.shortDesc: Next turn, 50% of the user's max HP is restored.
moves.desc: At the end of the next turn, the Pokemon at the user's position has 1/2 of the user's maximum HP restored to it, rounded down. Fails if this move is already in effect for the user's position.
moves.shortDescJa: User will recover half its max HP at the end of the next turn.
moves.descJa: At the end of the next turn, user will be healed for half its max HP.  If the user is switched out, its replacement will be healed instead for half of the user’s max HP.  If the user faints or is forcefully switched by Roar or Whirlwind, this effect will not activate.

moves.name: Wonder Room
moves.shortDesc: For 5 turns, all Defense and Sp. Def stats switch.
moves.desc: For 5 turns, all active Pokemon have their Defense and Special Defense stats swapped. Stat stage changes are unaffected. If this move is used during the effect, the effect ends.
moves.shortDescJa: All Pokémon’s Defense and Special Defense are swapped for 5 turns.
moves.descJa: For five turns (including this one), every Pokémon’s Defense and Special Defense are swapped.

moves.name: Wood Hammer
moves.shortDesc: Has 33% recoil.
moves.desc: If the target lost HP, the user takes recoil damage equal to 33% the HP lost by the target, rounded half up, but not less than 1 HP.
moves.shortDescJa: User receives 1/3 the damage inflicted in recoil.
moves.descJa: Inflicts regular damage.  User takes 1/3 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: Worry Seed
moves.shortDesc: The target's Ability becomes Insomnia.
moves.desc: Causes the target's Ability to become Insomnia. Fails if the target's Ability is As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Insomnia, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Truant, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero.
moves.shortDescJa: Changes the target’s ability to Insomnia.
moves.descJa: Changes the target’s ability to Insomnia.

moves.name: Wrap
moves.shortDesc: Traps and damages the target for 4-5 turns.
moves.desc: Prevents the target from switching for four or five turns (seven turns if the user is holding Grip Claw). Causes damage to the target equal to 1/8 of its maximum HP (1/6 if the user is holding Binding Band), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. The target can still switch out if it is holding Shed Shell or uses Baton Pass, Flip Turn, Parting Shot, Shed Tail, Teleport, U-turn, or Volt Switch.
